Briefs (ONE concept, three techniques):
- **`606-piano-vivisection`** ŌĆö median-filter **HPSS**: split his piano into sustained harmonic strings (time-median) vs transient percussive hammers (freq-median), soft Wiener masks, morph the balance. Refs: Fitzgerald DAFx 2010.
- **`607-piano-prism`** ŌĆö **NMF**: factor SŌēłW┬ĘH into 6 learned spectral components ├Ś activations (KL multiplicative updates), solo/mute/re-mix each. Refs: Lee & Seung 1999; Smaragdis & Brown 2003.
- **`608-piano-sieve`** ŌĆö **sinusoidal+residual (SMS)**: peak-pick deterministic tonal partials vs the stochastic residual (hammer/breath/room), sift + freeze + stretch. Refs: Serra & Smith 1990.

**Act ŌĆö DEEP 3-technique fan-out (all returned demoable + clean tsc+ESLint in isolation; all share the his-piano fetch+fallback, ~9s STFT pipeline, phase-preserving mask ISTFT, WebGL2 viz, off-glass keyboard/tilt, gentle limiter, auto-demo):**
- **`606-piano-vivisection` (WINNER, shipped)** ŌĆö median-filter HPSS strings-vs-hammers. Files: `page.tsx` (576), `hpss.ts` (384), `gl.ts` (301), `audio.ts` (142), `README.md`. WebGL2 field draws harmonic as cyan/steel horizontal streaks + percussive as magenta/white vertical strikes, balance-weighted, sweeping playhead. R32F texture w/ 8-bit fallback.
- **`607-piano-prism`** (banked ŌåÆ IDEAS ┬¦425) ŌĆö NMF 6-component prism, KL updates, per-component looping buffers behind per-component gains, colored bands + activation lanes. Files: `page.tsx` (633), `gl.ts` (265), `nmf.ts` (202), `audio.ts` (362), `README.md`.
- **`608-piano-sieve`** (banked ŌåÆ IDEAS ┬¦425) ŌĆö SMS tonal-vs-residual sieve + freeze + stretch, gold/white partial lines vs grey-blue noise cloud. Files: `page.tsx` (778), `gl.ts` (320), `audio.ts` (416), `README.md`.

(3) **most personal + surprising for a pianist** ŌĆö isolating the two physical mechanisms of his OWN piano (string vs hammer) is a genuine "huh!" and emotionally resonant, the way 557/583 won. (4) **fewest failure points** ŌĆö the simplest, most robust DSP of the trio. **607 banked** (the most technically ambitious + the gorgeous prism metaphor ŌĆö the strongest cycle-2 deepening, or fuse: HPSS pre-split ŌåÆ NMF the harmonic layer) + **608 banked** (tonal-vs-noise + freeze/stretch playground ŌĆö resurrect for a dedicated spectral-freeze/phase-vocoder fire) IDEAS ┬¦425.

- **`603-kids-yell-blob`** ŌĆö mic-voice (yell/roar/sing) ŌåÆ a giant wobbly **soft-body blob** (spring-mass / metaball, **raw WebGL2**, robust no-CDN) that squash-stretch INFLATES with loudness and **honks your voice back** exaggerated (comic formant/pitch DSP). INPUT mic-voice ┬Ę OUTPUT WebGL2 ┬Ę TECH soft-body-squish + comic-vocal-DSP ┬Ę VIBE silly-monster. Refs: Disney squash-&-stretch (Preston Blair *Cartoon Animation*); holtsetio softbody (2026).
- **`604-kids-stomp-band`** ŌĆö device-motion (SHAKE/STOMP, accel-spike detection) ŌåÆ a cartoon **junkyard one-toy-band**: each shake flings a googly spring/boing/clatter object into a **three.js** 3D physics pile that bonks and clangs with **cartoon foley** (boings, slide-whistles, springs, clatters ŌĆö pitched silly, NOT warm-JI). INPUT device-motion ┬Ę OUTPUT three.js ┬Ę TECH rigid-physics-pile + cartoon-foley ┬Ę VIBE chaotic-junkyard. Refs: Carl Stalling / Raymond Scott; one-man-band.
- **`605-kids-blow-parade`** ŌĆö mic-BLOW (breath/wind broadband detection) ŌåÆ a **parade of balloon-creatures** that INFLATE as you blow and **raspberry/squeak-deflate** when you stop, bobbling across a **WebGPU** scene (Canvas2D fallback). INPUT mic-blow ┬Ę OUTPUT WebGPU ┬Ę TECH breath-energy + balloon-physics + raspberry-synth ┬Ę VIBE giggly-parade. Refs: party-blower / whoopee-cushion foley; balloon physics.

(2) **strongest single-glance hero + most immediate causeŌåÆeffect for the youngest hands** ŌĆö one giant wobbling googly blob filling the screen; yellŌåÆit instantly inflates+honks, with no aiming, no sensor, no detection threshold to satisfy. (3) **funny + personal** ŌĆö hearing your *own* voice honked back is the most repeatable 4yo giggle and the strongest "huh!" for Karel. (4) **fewest failure points at the 06:30 glance** ŌĆö mic + WebGL2 (Ōēł98% support) + auto-demo + tap/key fallback. **604 banked** (IDEAS ┬¦424; most phone-native but closest to the existing `566-kids-shake-band` shakeŌåÆthree.js, and a more diffuse reward ŌĆö resurrect once 566 ages out) + **605 banked** (IDEAS ┬¦424; funniest single payoff + freshest INPUT sub-modality [breath] + safest render fallback, but a reactive toy not an instrument and the blow-detection thresholds are the trickiest unverified surface ŌĆö resurrect for a breath-input fire).

(b) **the blob actually reads as a goofy honking monster + the honk is funny-not-annoying** ŌĆö the spring-mass overshoot, the kid-safe chain, and the comic DSP are coded to spec, but only real speakers + a real yell confirm the loudness scaling (`rms*6`), centroidŌåÆhue tint, and honk tuning land (they're eye-tuned; a noisy/quiet room may want adjustment ŌĆö `autoGainControl` is off so a quiet room needs a louder yell). (d) **no Canvas2D fallback if WebGL2 is absent** ŌĆö only a `text-rose-300` notice (WebGL2 is ~98% incl. iOS Safari 15+, so low risk on Karel's review device). (e) the live-voice echo bus is held low (0.18) to avoid speaker feedback. The ~2.5s idle auto-demo + tap/keyboard fake-yell mean the hands-free 06:30 glance always shows a wobbling, honking blob, and Karel can yell at it himself at his desk/phone.

## Cycle 410 ŌĆö 2026-06-13 (UTC) ┬Ę KIDS build (410 % 2 == 0) ┬Ę **DEEP** (3 approaches, one concept) ┬Ę SHIPS `569-kids-ember-keeper` ŌĆö **The lab's FIRST cross-session persistent state: a glowing creature that lives in the device, remembers every visit, and grows a genuinely bigger, differently-shaped BODY each day a child returns ŌĆö and never resets. The directest literal answer to the jury's standing #6: "a creature a child finds genuinely changed tomorrow."**

**The build (winner `569`):** five subsystems + the cross-day persistence spine. (1) **Cross-session persistence** (`genome.ts`) ŌĆö a JSON genome in `localStorage` (`resonance.ember-keeper.v1`) that ONLY accumulates: `visits`, `distinctDays`, `totalHumSeconds`, a learned pentatonic `palette`, and an **append-only `tokens` list** (body parts). No decrement, no reset path anywhere ŌĆö the immutable-growth invariant is the soul. (2) **Day-aware growth** ŌĆö on load, stored `lastVisitDay` vs `new Date().toDateString()`; a NEW calendar day appends one big **"day" limb** on a golden-angle (phyllotaxis) spiral around the core, so today's body is visibly bigger than yesterday's. Within a day, a hummed note or a pet appends a small permanent **"hum" frond** + brightens the ember. (3) **Deterministic regrowth** (`makeBody`) ŌĆö each token carries a stable `id`; a `mulberry32` PRNG seeded from the id means the same genome ALWAYS regrows the same body (limbs never jump between loads ŌĆö D'Arcy Thompson's "growth as rule-based addition of parts" made literal). (4) **Analysis-only voice feeding** ŌĆö mic ŌåÆ `AnalyserNode` float buffer ŌåÆ autocorrelation pitch detection (Chris Wilson method, `pitch.ts`) ŌåÆ quantized to C-major pentatonic (nothing ever wrong) ŌåÆ echoed back softly + the integer degree added to the palette. The **analyser is a dead-end node** (never connected to destination); samples read per-frame + discarded; only the derived degree persists ŌĆö mic is genuinely never recorded/stored/transmitted. (5) **three.js render + Web Audio** ŌĆö emissive core + per-token limbs/fronds, the newest part scale+emissive-pops into place over ~2.6 s on wake; kids-safe `gain ŌåÆ BiquadFilter lowpass(8 kHz) ŌåÆ DynamicsCompressor(ŌłÆ10, 20:1) ŌåÆ destination` brick-wall limiter, all gains `setTargetAtTime`; AudioContext built inside the Wake gesture (`window.AudioContext || (window as any).webkitAudioContext`, eslint-disabled). **For the 06:30 hands-free review** (can't wait a real day): empty storage ŌåÆ `makeDemoGenome()` seeds a believable history (**5 visits / 4 days / 5-note palette / 10 tokens = 4 day-limbs + 6 fronds**), so the glance always shows a rich many-limbed creature breathing from frame one + singing on wake; a clearly-secondary **­¤īÖ next-day** button (top-right, outside the play area) TIME-TRAVELS so Karel watches a brand-new limb sparkle in on demand. **Graceful degradation both axes:** mic-denied ŌåÆ `text-rose-300` notice + tap-to-pet still grows; WebGL-fail ŌåÆ `text-rose-300` notice + a **DOM/CSS** orb (one petal per token) that still glows/grows/sings (NOT Canvas2D, per brief). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client mic + Web Audio + three.js ŌĆö no network, no secrets). **No new npm deps** (`three` already in package.json).

**Orient / git sync:** `git fetch` showed origin/main **force-updated** + local diverged 50/50 (`--ff-only` aborted ŌĆö the recurring container-drift, same as 404ŌĆō409); local stale at alt-lineage `2e98f5e` (cycle 305), origin authoritative at `62abff3` = cycle 409 `568-conductor-hands` ŌåÆ `git reset --hard origin/main` (max committed dream folder on disk **568**). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` MISSING in fresh container ŌåÆ `npm ci` (exit 0; package.json/lock untouched + excluded). Pre-allocated **569/570/571** to three builders (verified free as FOLDERS; NOTE the ┬¦409 banked text-seeds `569-conductor-batons`/`570-conductor-baton-motion` are stale number-labels ŌĆö those slugs now belong to this cycle's Ember pieces; the conductor seeds renumber on revival, per the banking convention).

No output Ōēź4 ŌåÆ no fresh audit ban this cycle. INPUT: camera-hands 568, shake 566, audio-file 564/557, mic 559, tilt 553, touch/drag 541 ŌĆö none Ōēź4. TECH: none Ōēź4. VIBE: kids structural. Standing JURY rolling-15 bans honored: WebGPU-compute OUTPUT, Canvas2D OUTPUT, GPU-physics-simŌåÆdrone TECH, finger-on-glass-default INPUT, calm-sensory-kids VIBE. `banned = [the standing jury set; SVG fell to 3├Ś so not freshly banned but deliberately AVOIDED to not push it to 4├Ś] ┬Ę picked(569) = [**mic-voice + tap INPUT** (off-glass core ŌĆö NOT the finger-on-glass default; mic at 1├Ś in last-10) ┬Ę **three.js OUTPUT** (NOT SVG [avoided at 3├Ś], NOT Canvas2D/WebGPU [jury-banned]; three.js at 2├Ś) ┬Ę **cross-session-persistent procedural-morphology TECH** (NOT a GPU-physicsŌåÆdrone ŌĆö the banned meta-technique) ┬Ę **companion/relationship/growth VIBE** (NOT calm-sensory-kids ŌĆö it rewards RETURNING; the jury's exact #6 ask to break the 90-second-glow-toy autopilot)]` ŌĆö clean on every standing jury ban; deliberately dodged the SVG edge. The DEEP trio spread OUTPUT three.js / WebGL2 / SVG so the loser-bank covers all three renderers.

**Act ŌĆö DEEP fan-out (3 parallel folder-isolated general-purpose builders, ONE concept ŌĆö *a creature genuinely different each day you return; never resets* ŌĆö via what evolves; numbers pre-allocated 569/570/571; each fully self-contained, own folder, no git, no shared docs, no API route; all shared the cross-session-persistence spine + day-aware growth + analysis-only mic + kids-safe limiter + fresh-device seed + ­¤īÖ time-travel):**

- **`570-kids-ember-song` (banked ŌåÆ IDEAS ┬¦410, `rm -rf`'d)** ŌĆö the SONG evolves: hummed phrases append to a persistent library, woven (Eno-style generative recombination) into a longer/richer piece each return; WebGL2 luminous orbiting strands, one per remembered phrase. Complete + build-reviewed (`page.tsx`, `weave.ts`, `render.ts`, `song-memory.ts`, `audio.ts`, `pitch.ts`). **The biggest CONCEPT of the trio** (the music itself grows across sessions ŌĆö a true lab-first nobody else has). **Lost on glance-legibility, not quality** ŌĆö its cross-day payoff is *audible* (a longer song), so at a SILENT 06:30 glance the abstract strands read less clearly than 569's visibly-bigger body. Resurrect for a music-forward kids fire, or fold in as 569's cycle-2 "it also sings your grown song."
- **`571-kids-ember-nest` (banked ŌåÆ IDEAS ┬¦410, `rm -rf`'d)** ŌĆö the WORLD evolves: each visit plants a permanent SVG cut-paper flower/star/friend, each a sustained pentatonic voice ŌåÆ a fuller world = a denser, warmer always-consonant additive chord (`0.16/ŌłÜn` per-voice keeps it kids-safe). Removes Tamagotchi's death/punishment loop (returning is always rewarded, never guilt). Complete + build-reviewed (`page.tsx`, `scene.ts`, `shapes.ts`, `audio.ts`, `pitch.ts`). **The warmest + most-legible-to-a-4yo** (a busy nest reads instantly). **Lost:** thematically closest to the existing `116-kids-bloom-garden` (self-seeding singing garden ŌĆö the "too similar" risk) AND another SVG output nudges the rolling-10 SVG toward the 4├Ś ban (it sat at 3├Ś). Resurrect when SVG is clear; add non-overlapping placement + a voice cap for months-old worlds.

**Curate ŌĆö why 569 won:** all three cleared the floor identically (4/5: #1 shared cross-session persistence + #2 + #3 + #4; #5 honestly unavailable), so the deciding axes were (1) **jury-#6 literalness** ŌĆö #6 asks for "a *creature* a child finds genuinely changed tomorrow"; 569's body visibly growing new limbs is the directest read (the CREATURE itself is changed), vs 570's changed *song* or 571's changed *world*; (2) **glance-robustness for the 06:30 hands-free phone review** ŌĆö a bigger many-limbed creature reads "it grew!" instantly at a silent glance, where 570's payoff must be *heard*; (3) **diversity vs the existing kids set + the SVG edge** ŌĆö a persistent-morphology creature is genuinely lab-first, whereas 571's filling-world echoes `116-kids-bloom-garden` and another SVG nudges the 4├Ś ban; (4) **surprise (Karel's #2)** ŌĆö the lab has never persisted anything across sessions; a creature that is literally a bigger, different organism each day is Tamagotchi-grade emotional pull the lab has never had. 570 (the biggest concept ŌĆö resurrect for a music fire / as 569's cycle-2 song layer) + 571 (the warmest, most-legible ŌĆö resurrect when SVG clears) banked as explicit resurrect paths.

**Validate:** banked both losers to IDEAS ┬¦410 ŌåÆ `rm -rf` 570/571 with ABSOLUTE paths (heeding ┬¦408's persisted-cwd no-op trap) ŌåÆ re-verified `git status` shows ONLY `569-kids-ember-keeper/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**` modified (no loser folders; all three builder agents had COMPLETED ŌĆö status `completed` ŌĆö before removal, heeding ┬¦399/┬¦401's premature-completion-race lesson; 571's builder also self-removed two stray `nest-*.ts` scaffolding files it didn't import) ŌåÆ grep-scanned the winner for ESLint traps (no `use[A-Z]` helpers; the one `as any` [`webkitAudioContext`, audio.ts:25] carries `// eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any` on the line above; no `ts-nocheck`/`ts-ignore`; no api route; README `./README.md` link present; README opens `**For**: kids (4+)` for dashboard tagging) ŌåÆ `rm -rf .next` ŌåÆ authoritative `npm run build` with ONLY the winner ŌåÆ **exit 0, `Ō£ō Compiled successfully in 101s`, `Ō£ō Generating static pages (446/446)`** (445ŌåÆ446 = the one new route), `/dream/569-kids-ember-keeper 6.03 kB / 294 kB First Load` prerendered static (the larger First Load is three.js). **Clean first run ŌĆö no fix attempt needed.** Build warnings all pre-existing in unrelated `src/lib/*` + older dream files; zero referencing the winner folder. `package.json`/`package-lock.json`/`next.config.*` confirmed unchanged + excluded. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no mic/audio/WebGL in this sandbox).

**Honesty carry-forward ŌĆö unverified surface (569):** (a) **not run in a real browser** ŌĆö verified by the builder's `tsc --noEmit` + ESLint + the authoritative `npm run build` only. (b) **real multi-day behaviour** (waiting actual calendar days) is exercised only via the ­¤īÖ time-travel control + `loadAndVisit`'s `toDateString` comparison ŌĆö never observed across real wall-clock days; **DST / timezone hops** around the day-boundary could mis-count a day (the ­¤īÖ button exists precisely so growth demos without trusting the clock). (c) **pitch detection** tuned for humming in a quiet room; very noisy rooms / very low/high voices may quantize oddly (can never sound "wrong", but the *learned* note may not match intent). (d) **unbounded growth** ŌĆö the genome is append-only by design; after hundreds of parts the scene crowds/slows, no cap or LOD yet (a real returning child accumulates slowly, so this is a far-future concern; a months-old creature is the stress case). (e) **iOS Safari** mic + AudioContext-in-gesture unlock coded to spec, untested on hardware; `webkitAudioContext` path untested on old Safari. (f) **localStorage blocked / private mode** ŌåÆ save fails silently, creature still plays for the session (no error shown ŌĆö deliberate, no fail state for kids). The fresh-device demo seed + ­¤īÖ time-travel are the safety net so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows a rich, clearly-grown creature with zero setup; and since Karel reviews on a device, he can grant the mic and actually hum to it.

## Cycle 409 ŌĆö 2026-06-13 (UTC) ┬Ę ADULT build (409 % 2 == 1) ┬Ę **DEEP** (3 approaches, one concept) ┬Ę SHIPS `568-conductor-hands` ŌĆö **Cycle 2 of the polytempo spine, made EMBODIED: raise both hands to the camera and conduct two incommensurable tempi ŌĆö your left hand beats one voice, your right beats another; the system snaps the two tempi to the nearest irrational ratio (ŌłÜ2, Žå, e/2, ŽĆ/2) so the two consonant voices drift through every phase relationship and can NEVER share a downbeat. Metric dissonance you feel in your own arms ŌĆö the jury's exact #1+#4 ask.**

**The build (winner `568`):** three subsystems + the embodied conducting layer. (1) **MediaPipe-Hands beat-extraction** (`tracking.ts`) ŌĆö `HandLandmarker` loaded via CDN ESM dynamic import (the 419/258 pattern, NOT an npm dep) + `getUserMedia({video})`; each hand's wrist (landmark 0) vertical position tracked per frame; a downbeat fires at the *bottom of a conducting stroke* (velocity zero-crossing downwardŌåÆupward, 150 ms debounce); the last-3 inter-beat-interval average ŌåÆ that hand's tempo, clamped 200ŌĆō1600 ms (Ōēł37ŌĆō300 BPM). Left hand = voice A, right hand = voice B (handedness mirror-mapped). (2) **The incommensurability lock** (`snapToIrrational`, the soul) ŌĆö voice A plays the gestured base period; `desiredRatio = gestured ratio folded Ōēź1`, then SNAP to the irrational *nearest in log-space* from {ŌłÜ2Ōēł1.414, ŽåŌēł1.618, e/2Ōēł1.359, ŽĆ/2Ōēł1.571}; voice B is forced to `periodA / ratio`. The human chooses the neighbourhood, the math guarantees non-periodicity ŌĆö the two pulses can never re-share a downbeat. Active ratio + name shown live. (3) **Web Audio** (`audio.ts`) ŌĆö `PolytempoEngine`: two warm pluck voices (triangle fundamental + soft octave-sine partial, fast pluck envelope) playing the same rising/falling D-pentatonic cell, voice B up a perfect fifth (├Ś1.5) ŌĆö consonant + distinguishable; each voice has its OWN sample-accurate **"Tale of Two Clocks" look-ahead scheduler** (25 ms `setInterval` pump scheduling `osc.start(t)` ~120 ms ahead, never setTimeout-per-note); master `gain ŌåÆ DynamicsCompressor(ŌłÆ10, 20:1) ŌåÆ destination` brick-wall limiter; AudioContext built inside the Start click (iOS unlock, `window.AudioContext||webkitAudioContext`). (4) **three.js phase-space** (`render.ts`) ŌĆö two emissive markers orbit their rings (one revolution per beat-period); a **Lissajous ribbon (x=voice-A phase, y=voice-B phase) that NEVER closes** because the ratio is irrational ŌĆö the geometric signature of a Nancarrow tempo canon, the *visible* proof the pulses never realign; each marker flashes (emissive bump + halo) on its scheduled beat; dark indigo field, violet=A / amber=B. (5) **Frame-one silent auto-demo** ŌĆö the phase-space animates two synthetic conductors at a default Žå from load, audio silent until the Start gesture (autoplay rules), so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows the two-pulse drift. **Camera-denied / MediaPipe-fail ŌåÆ `text-rose-300` notice + two tap pads ("Beat A"/"Beat B")** (fully playable, tap-interval ŌåÆ tempo). Camera + landmark data **local only** (never recorded/uploaded/networked). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client camera + Web Audio + three.js ŌĆö no network, no secrets). **No new npm deps** (`three` already in package.json; MediaPipe via CDN).

**Honesty carry-forward ŌĆö unverified surface (568):** (a) **not run in a real browser** ŌĆö verified by the builder's `tsc --noEmit` + ESLint + the authoritative `npm run build` only. (b) **MediaPipe handedness ŌåÆ user-hand mapping** ŌĆö the "Right" label is mapped to the user's left hand (mirror convention); unconfirmed live, worst case the two voices swap which hand drives them (harmless). (c) **beat-apex tuning** ŌĆö the velocity threshold (`0.002` normalized/frame) + 150 ms debounce are reasoned defaults, untuned against real conducting gestures / varying frame rates. (d) **GPU-delegate fallback** ŌĆö MediaPipe requested with `delegate:"GPU"`; on devices without WebGL2 for the delegate it may throw ŌåÆ falls back to tap pads rather than retrying `"CPU"`. (e) **visual phase vs audible beat** ŌĆö markers integrate phase on the rAF clock while audio schedules on the AudioContext clock; the beat *flashes* are scheduler-driven (stay aligned) but the orbiting markers can drift tens of ms over long sessions, uncorrected. (f) iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock; the README `<Link>` to the GitHub README is an external link (no 404 route, unlike the lab-wide `./README.md` pattern). The frame-one silent auto-demo + tap-pad fallback are the safety net so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows the perpetual drift; and since Karel reviews on a device with a camera, he can actually conduct it.

## Cycle 408 ŌĆö 2026-06-13 (UTC) ┬Ę KIDS build (408 % 2 == 0) ┬Ę **WIDE** (3 orthogonal off-glass explorers) ┬Ę SHIPS `566-kids-shake-band` ŌĆö **Shake the tablet like a maraca and a whole Brazilian batucada band dances and plays back in time: gentle jiggles ring the chocalho shimmer, big arm-swings bring in the surdo bass drum, and five glowing 3D characters bounce + flash on a darkened stage, one per instrument. The child's whole arm is the instrument ŌĆö off-glass, embodied, joyful.**

**The build (winner `566`):** off-glass shake input + three.js stage + synthesized percussion ensemble + always-on groove bed. (1) **DeviceMotion shake-onset detection** (`motion.ts`) ŌĆö `accelerationIncludingGravity` magnitude ŌåÆ adaptive threshold (1.4├Ś rolling average, 3.5 m/s┬▓ floor) with an 80 ms refractory; intensity tiers (Ōēł3/9/18 m/s┬▓) select which instrument fires; iOS `DeviceMotionEvent.requestPermission()` called synchronously inside the Start click (the `await` after). (2) **Pointer-drag-velocity fallback** ŌĆö drag speed in px/ms drives the same magnitudeŌåÆhit mapping so it's playable on a laptop/denied-permission. (3) **Web Audio batucada voice pool** (`audio.ts`) ŌĆö five from-scratch synth voices (surdo = sine 130ŌåÆ42 Hz pitch-drop, caixa = bandpass noise + triangle snap, repique = sine + noise transient, agog├┤ = three sine partials, chocalho = soft bandpass-noise grain); master `gain ŌåÆ lowpass(7.5 kHz) ŌåÆ DynamicsCompressor(ŌłÆ10 dB, 20:1) ŌåÆ destination` brick-wall limiter so even a hard slam can't spike a child's ears. (4) **Groove-bed scheduler** ŌĆö a look-ahead loop at 92 BPM plays a 16-step batucada pattern (surdo 1+3, caixa 2+4, repique fills, agog├┤ accent on 1, chocalho off-beats) always-on, so the child's shakes layer ON TOP of a musical bed and it always sounds good. (5) **three.js stage** (`page.tsx`) ŌĆö five glowing `IcosahedronGeometry` characters (`MeshStandardMaterial` emissive) with per-character `PointLight` flash + spring-physics bounce (exp ~50 ms decay ŌåÆ feels immediate), gentle camera sway. (6) **Zero-permission auto-demo:** CSS-animated colored orbs bounce from frame one (audio waits for the Start gesture for autoplay rules), and the groove bed plays itself once started ŌĆö so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows a dancing band. **Motion denied/unsupported ŌåÆ `text-rose-300` notice + drag fallback active.** **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client DeviceMotion [local sensor, never recorded/uploaded] + Web Audio + three.js ŌĆö no network, no secrets). **No new npm deps** (`three@^0.182.0` already in package.json).

**Orient / git sync:** `git fetch` showed origin/main **force-updated** + local diverged 50/50 (`--ff-only` aborted ŌĆö the recurring container-drift, same as 404/405/406/407); local stale at alt-lineage `2e98f5e` (cycle 305), origin authoritative at `8efb487` = cycle 407 `564-piano-splat-cathedral` ŌåÆ `git reset --hard origin/main` (max committed dream folder on disk **564**). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` MISSING in fresh container ŌåÆ `npm ci` (exit 0; package.json/lock untouched + excluded). Pre-allocated **565/566/567** to three builders (verified free; the ┬¦407 banked-seed slugs 562/563 left untouched as text).

**Research-first dive (RESEARCH ┬¦408):** WebSearch across real-time browser audio-visual + kids face/expression interaction, June 2026. Surfaced **Aalap Davjekar, "I Turned My Browser into a Visual Synthesizer" (Medium, May 2026)** ŌĆö a full in-browser visual synth at 60 fps driving MediaPipe selfie-segmentation silhouette + spring-physics typography off live FFT mic data; current-month, client-buildable, genuinely surprising as an *architecture* (segmentation + audio + physics composited per-frame in a browser). **But it binds cleanly to a camera-BODY/silhouette piece ŌĆö the exact lane the jury flagged as trodden (and the lane this kids cycle deliberately avoided)** ŌĆö so I do NOT claim #5 for today's build; logged honestly as a future-prototype seed (a "your shadow is a creature painted by your own voice's spectrum" piece). Also confirmed **MediaPipe Face is NOT a lab-first** (grep: `258-kids-mirror-pets`, `423-kids-face-beat` already use it), which killed a face-creature explorer's novelty edge before spawning. **Chain visible:** dive (no kids-appropriate <14-day technique that dodges the trodden camera-body lane) ŌåÆ today's build leans on the diversity menu's *cross-modal off-glass* lane instead (accelerometer ŌåÆ percussion), honestly NOT a research-bind cycle.

**Decide ŌĆö gates cleared:**
- **mode: WIDE** ŌĆö alternation (407 DEEP ŌåÆ 408 WIDE) + Karel's standing "too similar" complaint ŌåÆ three unrelated off-glass directions in one fire. JURY 2026-06-12 names NO kids spine to DEEP-extend (its kids note #6 = `518-living-ember`, already extended by `549` in cycle 402) ŌåÆ the jury-naming-overrides-alternation rule does not fire ŌåÆ WIDE stands.

- **Ambition floor (winner `566`): honest 3/5** ŌĆö `ambition: #2 Ōēź3 subsystems (DeviceMotion onset detection + Web Audio percussion pool + groove scheduler + three.js character stage + drag fallback = 5) + #3 named reference that DRIVES the build (Brazilian batucada bloco ŌĆö the shake-intensity tiers ARE the ensemble's dynamic hierarchy: chocalho shimmer on top, surdo as the heavy bottom; the 16-step bed is a real batucada pattern; also Evelyn Glennie's whole-body-rhythm philosophy)`. **#1 NOT claimed** ŌĆö accelerometer input (417-cradle, 553-tilt) and synth percussion both exist; the fresh element is *shake-acceleration ŌåÆ percussion ensemble*, an interaction not a lab-first technique, framed honestly. **#5 NOT claimed** (the dive's bind is to the avoided camera-body lane; said plainly). INPUT: finger-on-glass family 3├Ś (541/537/538), not Ōēź4; audio-file 2├Ś (564/557). TECH: no core Ōēź4 (Gaussian-splat 2├Ś). VIBE: kids 5├Ś (structural, alternation); within-kids calm-sensory only 1├Ś (541), not banned. Standing JURY rolling-15 bans also honored: WebGPU-compute OUTPUT, Canvas2D OUTPUT, GPU-physics-simŌåÆdrone TECH, finger-on-glass-default INPUT, calm-sensory-kids VIBE. `banned = [SVG OUTPUT (rolling-10 4├Ś) + the standing jury set] ┬Ę picked(566) = [**device-motion / shake INPUT** (off-glass ŌĆö distinct from BOTH recent kids inputs: mic @406, tilt/orientation @404; the directest dodge of the finger reflex) ┬Ę **three.js OUTPUT** (NOT SVG [4├Ś], NOT Canvas2D/WebGPU [jury-banned]; three.js sat at 2├Ś) ┬Ę **accelerometer-onset ŌåÆ percussion-pool TECH** (NOT a simulated-physical-field GPU drone ŌĆö the banned meta-technique) ┬Ę **energetic/celebratory/embodied VIBE** (NOT calm-sensory-kids ŌĆö a dancing band you drive with your arm; the directest answer to jury #6 "break the calm-sensory autopilot")]` ŌĆö clean on the live SVG ban and every standing jury ban. The WIDE trio spread INPUT mic-sing/shake/camera-color ├Ś OUTPUT WebGL2/three.js/WebGL2 ├Ś TECH harmonizer/percussion-pool/hue-sonification ŌĆö three genuinely orthogonal off-glass directions.

**Act ŌĆö WIDE fan-out (3 parallel folder-isolated sonnet builders, three orthogonal off-glass inputs ├Ś non-banned renderers; numbers pre-allocated 565/566/567; each fully self-contained, own folder, no git, no shared docs, no API route):**
- **`566-kids-shake-band` (WINNER, shipped)** ŌĆö SHAKE (DeviceMotion) ŌåÆ three.js ŌåÆ Brazilian batucada dancing band.
- **`565-kids-sing-choir` (banked ŌåÆ IDEAS ┬¦408, `rm -rf`'d)** ŌĆö MIC-sing live pitch ŌåÆ raw-WebGL2 particle creatures ŌåÆ Jacob Collier-style 4-voice live vocal harmonizer (you become the lead of a chord). Complete + build-reviewed (`page.tsx` ~746, `audio.ts`, `pitch.ts`). **Lost on the DIVERSITY gate, not quality** ŌĆö its input is **mic**, exactly what the *immediately prior* kids cycle (406 clap-canon) used; repeating the previous kids cycle's primary modality is the "too similar" trap. Also the riskiest unverified surface (pitch detection on a breathy 4yo voice). The biggest *concept* of the trio ŌĆö resurrect the next time the diversity audit clears mic.
- **`567-kids-color-garden` (banked ŌåÆ IDEAS ┬¦408, `rm -rf`'d)** ŌĆö rear CAMERA dominant-color ŌåÆ raw-WebGL2 instanced glowing plants ŌåÆ Scriabin hueŌåÆpitch garden the real world grows. Complete + build-reviewed (`page.tsx` ~517, `audio.ts`, `vision.ts`, `render.ts` ~392). **Lost:** camera-color is thematically adjacent to the existing `368-kids-rainbow-quest` (foraging quest) and camera is the jury-flagged trodden input lane; also the most lighting-fragile for the hands-free glance.

**Curate ŌĆö why 566 won:** all three cleared the floor identically (3/5, #2+#3; no #5 bind honestly available for a kids cycle) and dodged the SVG ban, so the deciding axes were (1) **cross-cycle diversity / the "too similar" mandate** ŌĆö 565's mic input repeats cycle 406's exact modality, where 566's shake/accelerometer is distinct from BOTH recent kids inputs (mic @406, tilt @404); (2) **surprise + embodiment** (Karel's #2) ŌĆö the lab has never shipped a shake-driven percussion ensemble; the child's whole arm is the instrument, the most embodied of the three; (3) **glance-robustness for the 06:30 hands-free phone review** ŌĆö Karel reviews *on his phone*, so he can **literally shake it to play**, and the zero-permission auto-demo groove + bouncing orbs show a dancing band even with no sensor grant, where 565 needs the child to sing sustained pitch and 567 needs a rear camera + good lighting + colorful objects; (4) **answers jury #6 directly** ŌĆö an energetic dancing band breaks the calm-sensory-kids autopilot the jury flagged. 565 (the biggest concept ŌĆö resurrect when mic clears) + 567 (the off-the-couch explorer) banked as explicit resurrect paths.

**Validate:** banked both losers to IDEAS ┬¦408 ŌåÆ `rm -rf 565 567` (note: first `rm` attempt silently no-op'd because a prior `cd` into the 566 subfolder had persisted the shell cwd ŌĆö re-ran with absolute paths and confirmed via `git status`) ŌåÆ re-verified `git status` shows ONLY `566-kids-shake-band/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**` modified (no loser folders; all three builder agents had COMPLETED ŌĆö status `completed` ŌĆö before removal, heeding ┬¦399/┬¦401's premature-completion-race lesson) ŌåÆ grep-scanned the winner for known ESLint traps (no `use[A-Z]` helpers; both `as any` casts carry `eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any`; all `let`s genuinely reassigned; no `ts-nocheck`) ŌåÆ `rm -rf .next` ŌåÆ authoritative `npm run build` with ONLY the winner ŌåÆ **exit 0, `Ō£ō Compiled successfully in 92s`, `Ō£ō Generating static pages (444/444)`** (443ŌåÆ444 = the one new route), `/dream/566-kids-shake-band 5.07 kB / 293 kB First Load` prerendered static (the larger First Load is three.js). **Clean first run ŌĆö no fix attempt needed.** Build warnings are all pre-existing in unrelated `src/lib/*` + older dream files; **zero** errors in the winner folder. `package.json`/`package-lock.json`/`next.config.*` confirmed unchanged + excluded. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no accelerometer/audio/WebGL in this sandbox).

**Honesty carry-forward ŌĆö unverified surface (566):** (a) **iOS motion-permission timing** ŌĆö `requestPermission()` must fire synchronously inside the click handler before the `await`; the code does this, but it's untested on real iOS hardware. (b) **accelerometer calibration** ŌĆö the magnitude tiers (3/9/18 m/s┬▓) are heuristic; the adaptive threshold (1.4├Ś rolling avg, 3.5 floor) should compensate but a very calm phone sensor may need tuning (over/under-fire). (c) the groove scheduler is **`setTimeout`-based look-ahead, not the tightest sample-accurate `setInterval`+scheduleAhead** ŌĆö at 92 BPM it's fine for a demo but may drift slightly under heavy main-thread load. (d) **60 fps on low-end Android** ŌĆö the scene is light (5 meshes + 5 lights) but unprofiled on entry-level tablets. (e) `webkitAudioContext` path untested on old Safari; the README `<Link>` to `./README.md` 404s as a route (cosmetic, lab-wide). The zero-permission CSS auto-demo + always-on groove are the safety net so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows a dancing band; **and since Karel reviews on his phone, he can shake it to actually play.**

**Queued next + why:**
- **Cycle 409 (adult, odd):** alternation says DEEP next (408 was WIDE), unless the next jury names a piece. The standing highest-value adult move remains a SECOND honest **4/5** ŌĆö cycle 405 landed the first (557 splat-galaxy). **564 cycle-3 (the splat spine)** is the obvious DEEP candidate: swap the cathedral's two-axis anisotropy for `563`'s full EWA covariance projection (banked IDEAS ┬¦407) + load a REAL captured `.splat` scene ŌåÆ the reconstruction-grade cathedral (the clean 5/5 path).
- **566 cycle-2 (if Karel loves it):** add shake-DIRECTION ŌåÆ instrument selection (left/right/forward picks a different drum), a two-kid mode (two phones each a section of the band), tune the magnitude tiers from real-device data, swap the `setTimeout` bed for a sample-accurate scheduler.
- **Banked this fire (IDEAS ┬¦408):** `565-kids-sing-choir` (Jacob Collier live vocal harmonizer ŌĆö resurrect when mic clears the diversity audit) + `567-kids-color-garden` (Scriabin world-grows-a-garden ŌĆö resurrect when the camera lane is clear).
- **Carried open spines:** Splat (557ŌåÆ564, the strongest 4/5 lineage), Xenharmonic Drone (538ŌåÆ552), Companion/Presence kids (518ŌåÆ549), Polytempo/conducted-canon (514ŌåÆ545), Living Earth (463ŌåÆ471), Resonant Room (475ŌåÆ486), Granular (520), Together (505/508), Hand-as-creature (524), Genre-Arc (526), Drawing-ML (529), Cross-synthesis/his-real-music (532ŌåÆ557), Living-flock (537), Liquid-light kids (541), Tilt-fountain kids (553), Clap-canon kids (559), Shake-band kids (566, NEW).

## Cycle 407 ŌĆö 2026-06-13 (UTC) ┬Ę ADULT build (407 % 2 == 1) ┬Ę **DEEP** (3 approaches, one concept) ┬Ę SHIPS `564-piano-splat-cathedral` ŌĆö **Cycle 2 of the splat spine, the "massively bigger concept": Karel's real Welcome Home piano doesn't just make a cloud ŌĆö it BUILDS A CATHEDRAL. A luminous Gothic nave of anisotropic, depth-SORTED Gaussian splats ŌĆö floor ŌåÆ columns ŌåÆ arches ŌåÆ transept ŌåÆ vault ŌåÆ rose window ŌĆö raised element-by-element by the music's onsets, lit by pitch, that you fly down the centre of. Stateful, not a loop: a floor + one column pair at second 10; the full vault and a blooming rose window by minute 3.**

**The build (winner `564`):** three subsystems + long-form state. (1) **Audio fetch + FFT + onset/pitch detection** (`audio.ts`) ŌĆö on the Begin gesture, `AudioContext` + `AnalyserNode` (fftSize 2048); fetches **Karel's real piano** `/api/audio/549fc519-f7fc-4c38-a771-adaad2edbc81` (dual-mode JSON `{url}` or raw bytes, `decodeAudioData`, 4 s timeout, looped) ŌåÆ an always-on **synth-piano fallback** (warm partials, hammer envelopes, diatonic/lydian arpeggios with clear onsets) so it ALWAYS sounds offline; master chain ends in a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter. Per frame: spectral flux vs adaptive EMA ŌåÆ onset; spectral peak ŌåÆ pitch ŌåÆ hue; energy ŌåÆ loudness. (2) **Procedural cathedral geometry + build sequencer** (`cathedral.ts`) ŌĆö the nave is pre-generated at startup as typed-array splat positions/axes/radii for an ordered element list (floor 160 ┬Ę 5 column pairs 120 ea ┬Ę 5 arches 80 ea ┬Ę 2 transept arms 140 ea ┬Ę 4 vault bays 200 ea ┬Ę rose window 240 ┬Ę ambient 80); onsets raise the next element **in architectural order** (floor up, columns before arches before vault), permanent once raised, re-lit by later onsets ŌĆö so the piece is demonstrably different at minute 3 than second 10 (long-form state/memory, not a loop). (3) **Anisotropic, depth-SORTED Gaussian-splat rasterizer (the cycle-2 technique leap)** ŌĆö each splat is an **oriented ellipse**, not 557's isotropic circle: per-splat world axes (`axisA/axisB`) aligned to its surface (column shaft = vertical flakes, arch = tangent flakes, vault = flat ceiling patches, rose = radial petals); the vertex shader projects the axis tips to screen space (EWA-style tip-projection, Zwicker 2001 ŌĆö a two-axis approximation, NOT full covariance) ŌåÆ an oriented stretched quad; the fragment evaluates an elliptical Gaussian + a small additive emissive core for glow. **Every frame the live splats are depth-SORTED back-to-front by view-Z and composited with `gl.blendFunc(SRC_ALPHA, ONE_MINUS_SRC_ALPHA)`, depth-test OFF** ŌĆö real alpha-over occlusion (a near column genuinely hides a far one), the correctness leap 557's additive-no-sort renderer lacked. Camera slowly flies forward down the nave + auto-rotate; orbit-on-drag + wheel zoom. **Pre-Begin auto-demo:** synthetic onsets build + light the cathedral from frame one, zero permission (the 06:30 hands-free phone-glance safety net); audio waits for the Begin gesture. **No API route, no `guard`** (consumes the existing read-only `/api/audio/[id]` GET ŌĆö no side effects, no secrets, same pattern as 557/532/283). **No new npm deps.**

**Orient / git sync:** `git fetch` showed origin/main **force-updated** + local diverged 50/50 (`--ff-only` aborted ŌĆö the recurring container-drift, same as 403/404/405/406); local stale at alt-lineage `2e98f5e` (cycle 305), origin authoritative at `3c19de8` = cycle 406 `559-kids-clap-canon` ŌåÆ `git reset --hard origin/main` (max committed dream folder on disk **559**). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` MISSING in fresh container ŌåÆ `npm ci` (exit 0; package.json/lock untouched + excluded). Pre-allocated **562/563/564** to three builders (verified free; the ┬¦405/┬¦406 banked-seed slugs 556/558/560/561 left untouched).

**Research-first dive (RESEARCH ┬¦407) ŌĆö a genuinely current-month well:** WebSearch across browser/real-time Gaussian splatting, June 2026. Found the consistent 2026 signal that **real-time, depth-SORTED, anisotropic (EWA-projected) 3DGS is now a phone-grade browser commodity** ŌĆö **SparseStreet** (arXiv 2606.03909, June 2026; ICMR '26 Jun 16ŌĆō19), **MOBILE-GS** (ICLR 2026, 116 FPS sorted 3DGS on a phone), **WebSplatter** (arXiv 2602.03207, Feb 2026), Visionary (WebGPU full-GPU sort), antimatter15/splat (canonical CPU-sort WebGL). The bindable hook: 557 (cycle 1) deliberately took the cheap path ŌĆö **isotropic** billboards, **additive**, **no sort** (flat glow, no occlusion); the wave says the honest renderer is now affordable, so cycle 2's job is the **correctness leap to anisotropic + per-frame sorted alpha-over**. **Chain visible:** dive (2026 = sorted anisotropic 3DGS is browser-commodity; 557 took the cheap path) ŌåÆ today's build leaps to the honest renderer AND arranges it into a buildable architecture.

## Cycle 406 ŌĆö 2026-06-13 (UTC) ┬Ę KIDS build (406 % 2 == 0) ┬Ę **WIDE** (3 orthogonal off-glass explorers) ┬Ę SHIPS `559-kids-clap-canon` ŌĆö **Steve Reich's phasing, for a 4-year-old: clap a rhythm into the mic, two friendly blobs clap it back, then one drifts ~1.8% faster so the patterns slide unison ŌåÆ shimmering interlock ŌåÆ unison over ~30ŌĆō40 s; a big phase-wheel with two chasing dots makes the drift VISIBLE. The jury's #4 "time-tension piece ŌĆö but it had no children" answered literally.**

**The build (winner `559`):** four subsystems. (1) **mic clap/onset detection** ŌĆö `getUserMedia({audio})` ŌåÆ `AnalyserNode` (fftSize 2048); per-rAF time-domain RMS vs a fast-attack/slow-decay EMA background; onset fires when `rms > max(0.015, ema┬Ę2.5)` with a 120 ms refractory; 2ŌĆō6 detected claps ŌåÆ an inter-onset-interval array (a ~2 s silence commits; <2 claps ŌåÆ a default Reich-style 6-clap pattern so it ALWAYS works). (2) **phase-canon scheduler** ŌĆö two voices share the IOI array; voice B's interval ├Ś `(1ŌłÆ0.018)` = ~1.8% shorter loop; a 25 ms `setInterval` schedules sample-accurate `start(t)` 120 ms ahead (look-ahead, no `setTimeout`-per-note). Voice A = warm bandpass-noise clap + low sine body; voice B = bright highpass woodblock + triangle tone. (3) **SVG render via direct rAF attribute mutation** (no per-frame React `setState`) ŌĆö the phase-wheel dots, character body-scale, glow opacity, hand positions all `setAttribute`'d each frame; React state only for discrete UI (clap count, phase word). (4) **character animation** ŌĆö two cute SVG blob-creatures (ellipses + eyes + hands) flash/scale on each scheduled clap (decay 6├Ś/s), `feGaussianBlur` glow pulse. Master `gain(0.75) ŌåÆ DynamicsCompressor(ŌłÆ10 dBFS, 20:1) ŌåÆ destination` brick-wall limiter; AudioContext built in the Start gesture (iOS unlock, `window.AudioContext||webkitAudioContext`). **Hands-free auto-demo:** the phase-wheel + blobs animate from frame one with a built-in pattern (sin-driven flashes) at zero clicks (audio waits for the Start gesture); cancels on interaction, resumes after ~4 s idle. **Mic-denied ŌåÆ `text-rose-300` notice + tap-anywhere clap fallback** (fully playable). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client mic [local only, never recorded/uploaded/networked] + Web Audio + SVG ŌĆö no network, no secrets). **No new npm deps.**

**Orient / git sync:** `git fetch` showed origin/main **force-updated** + local diverged 50/50 (`--ff-only` aborted ŌĆö the recurring container-drift, same as 385/399/403/404/405); local stale at alt-lineage `2e98f5e` (cycle 305), origin authoritative at `8bea2f4` = cycle 405 `557-piano-splat-galaxy` ŌåÆ `git reset --hard origin/main` (max committed dream folder on disk **557**). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` MISSING in fresh container ŌåÆ `npm ci` (exit 0; package.json/lock untouched + excluded). Pre-allocated **559/560/561** to three builders (verified free; the ┬¦405 banked-seed slugs 556/558 left untouched).

**Research-first dive (RESEARCH ┬¦406):** WebSearch across (a) children's music interaction ├Ś body-tracking ├Ś WebGPU June 2026 and (b) collaborative kids music-making. Surfaced a real platform-level note ŌĆö **a usable WebGPU baseline now shipped to all major browsers via the Interop 2026 project** (verified 2026, recent) ŌĆö but that's a *platform* fact, not a bindable *technique*, and kids WebGPU is already in the lab (518/520/541). No kid-appropriate, client-buildable, genuinely <14-day technique surfaced; cs.SD remains server-ML (the honest read carried since ┬¦386). **#5 NOT claimed**, said plainly. **Honesty carry-forward ŌĆö unverified surface (559):** (a) **clap detection on a real 4-year-old in a real room** ŌĆö the EMA onset detector is standard and claps are sharp transients (the easy case), but a noisy room / quiet claps may mis-fire; the default-pattern fallback + tap-anywhere mode guarantee it always plays. (b) **whether the ~1.8% drift reads as Reich phasing over a real listen** ŌĆö the phase-wheel makes it visible immediately (the legibility crutch for a short glance), but whether a child *hears* the slide as a single evolving groove vs two patterns is the core unverified perceptual claim. (d) the README `<Link>` to `./README.md` 404s as a route (cosmetic, lab-wide). The zero-permission SVG auto-demo is the safety net so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows the wheel turning and the two blobs drifting in and out of sync with no setup.

## Cycle 405 ŌĆö 2026-06-12 (UTC) ┬Ę ADULT build (405 % 2 == 1) ┬Ę **DEEP** (3 approaches, one concept) ┬Ę SHIPS `557-piano-splat-galaxy` ŌĆö **THE FIRST HONEST 4/5 IN ~8 JURIES. The lab's FIRST Gaussian-splatting renderer: every note of Karel's real Welcome Home piano BIRTHS a bloom of glowing Gaussian splats, so his performance accretes into a living galaxy of light you orbit ŌĆö onsets are bursts, sustained notes drift into nebula, pitch paints the color, phrasing draws the arms.**

**The build (winner `557`):** three subsystems. (1) **Audio fetch + FFT + onset/pitch detection** (`audio.ts`) ŌĆö on the Begin gesture, `AudioContext` + `AnalyserNode` (fftSize 2048); fetches **Karel's real piano** `/api/audio/549fc519-f7fc-4c38-a771-adaad2edbc81` (dual-mode: JSON `{url}` or raw bytes, `decodeAudioData`, looped) with a 4 s timeout ŌåÆ an always-on **synth-piano fallback** (warm partials, soft hammer envelopes, overlapping C-lydian arpeggios with clear onsets) so it ALWAYS sounds offline; master chain ends in a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter. Per frame: **spectral flux** (positive bin-to-bin increases) vs an adaptive EMA threshold ŌåÆ onset; spectral peak ŌåÆ dominant pitch ŌåÆ hue; energy ŌåÆ loudness; centroid ŌåÆ brightness. (2) **Generative bloom particle system** (`splat.ts`, CPU pool) ŌĆö an onset spawns ~80ŌĆō300 splats from a point on a slowly-growing ring (arms, not a blob) with outward shell velocities; loudness ŌåÆ count+size, brightness ŌåÆ tight core vs diffuse; a ~13k-splat typed-array pool integrates each frame (Euler + drag + cheap curl-noise turbulence + differential galactic shear) and recycles oldest. (3) **Raw WebGL2 additive Gaussian-splat rasterizer + orbit cam** (`splat.ts`, GPU) ŌĆö one unit quad via `drawArraysInstanced`; per-instance pos/color/size/alpha via `bufferSubData`; vertex shader billboards each quad to face the camera; fragment shader radial Gaussian `alpha = exp(-4┬Ędot(uv,uv))`; **additive blending** (`SRC_ALPHA, ONE`), depth test OFF ŌåÆ order-independent (no depth sort ŌåÆ robust + glowing); hand-rolled `mat4` perspective+lookAt, slow auto-rotate. Pre-Begin, synthetic blooms keep the galaxy alive and turning (the 06:30 hands-off safety net). **No API route, no `guard`** (consumes the existing read-only `/api/audio/[id]` GET ŌĆö no side effects, no secrets, the same pattern as 283/532/165). **No new npm deps.**

**Orient / git sync:** `git fetch` showed origin/main **force-updated** + local diverged 50/50 (`--ff-only` aborted ŌĆö the recurring container-drift, same as 363/368/371/376/385/399/403/404); local stale at alt-lineage `2e98f5e`, origin authoritative at `a3e7810` = cycle 404 `553-kids-tilt-fountain` ŌåÆ `git reset --hard origin/main` (max committed dream folder on disk **553**). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` MISSING in fresh container ŌåÆ `npm ci` (exit 0; package.json/lock untouched + excluded). Pre-allocated **556/557/558** to three builders (verified free; banked-seed slugs 550/551/554/555 left untouched).

**Research-first dive (RESEARCH ┬¦405) ŌĆö the streak breaks:** since ┬¦386 the dive has written "cs.SD is server-ML, #5 unclaimable" **nine times**; JURY 2026-06-12 #5 called the decay out explicitly and named the *other* wells (graphics/WebGPU, TouchDesigner, AV-artist show news). This dive went there and found a real one: **BrightCoding "Run Gaussian Splatting in Your Browser with WebGPU," 2026-06-05 (7 days old)** ŌĆö 3DGS radiance-field rendering is now a browser commodity (WebGPU + WebGL2 rasterization, no plugins). Corroborated by **arxiv cs.GR June 8ŌĆō12 2026** (2606.11529 XPR cross-platform point renderer, 2606.11390 multi-GPU GS, 2606.09606 path-traced GS ŌĆö point-based radiance fields dominate cs.GR this week) and the **DNE├ŚGracia 4D-Gaussian-splatting performance of singer Amy May (2026)** ŌĆö a musical performer rendered as a streamable in-browser volumetric splat scene. **Chain visible:** dive (browser-splatting wave + a music performer as a splat scene) ŌåÆ today's build (his real piano sculpts a splat galaxy).

**Decide ŌĆö gates cleared:**
- **mode: DEEP** ŌĆö alternation (404 WIDE ŌåÆ 405 DEEP) + the orchestration guide's "one massive concept via parallel approaches." The goal is the 4/5 itself; a brand-new #1-technique piece that also binds the fresh finding hits the headline more directly than re-extending. Documented openly.

All three explorers cleared 4/5 identically; curation decided on surprise + non-redundancy + glance-spectacle.
- **Diversity audit (JURY 2026-06-12 rolling-15 bans, applied):** `banned = [WebGPU-compute OUTPUT (4├Ś) ┬Ę Canvas2D OUTPUT (4├Ś) ┬Ę GPU-physics-simŌåÆdrone TECH (4├Ś) ┬Ę finger-on-glass INPUT (7├Ś) ┬Ę calm-sensory-kids VIBE (4├Ś)] ┬Ę picked(557) = [**audio-file INPUT** (his real piano ŌĆö off-glass, the directest dodge of the 7├Ś finger reflex) ┬Ę **WebGL2 splat-rasterization OUTPUT** (NOT Canvas2D, NOT WebGPU ŌĆö both banned at 4├Ś; a wholly new rendering paradigm for the lab; WebGL2 sat at 3├Ś, not banned) ┬Ę **Gaussian-splat radiance-field TECH** (the sound source is his RECORDED music driving a renderer ŌĆö the exact INVERSE of the banned "simulate a physical medium, sonify its field statistics" move) ┬Ę **volumetric/immersive/Anadol VIBE** (NOT calm-sensory-kids; NOT the cerebral-meditative-drone single-presence cluster ŌĆö 557 is a vivid expressive accreting spectacle, not a leave-it-running drone)]` ŌĆö **clean on every jury ban**, and answers #1 (a 4/5 with a fresh bind) + #5 (revive the research-first rule from a non-cs.SD well).
- **Love-aware bias:** the loved piano-visualizer cluster (`163-paths-visualizer`ŌØż’ĖÅ pattern reused by 283/532) softly backs feeding his real Welcome Home piano; additive ŌĆö the jury + ambition/diversity gates governed.

**Act ŌĆö DEEP fan-out (3 parallel folder-isolated builders, ONE concept ŌĆö *his real piano sculpts a navigable cloud of glowing Gaussian splats* ŌĆö via three render attacks; numbers pre-allocated 556/557/558; each fully self-contained, own folder, no git, no shared docs, no API route):**

Complete + build-reviewed. **Lost:** the most *legible/analytical* but the least *surprising* ŌĆö a "3D spectrogram" is a familiar AV trope.

**Curate ŌĆö why 557 won:** all three cleared 4/5 identically (#1+#2+#3+#5) and dodged every jury ban, so the deciding axes were (1) **surprise / non-redundancy** (Karel's #2 + his "too similar" complaint) ŌĆö 557's accretive onset-galaxy has **no sibling in the lab**, where 556 (3D spectrogram) is a familiar trope and 558 (breathing piano-volume) is adjacent to 283-piano-isosurface; (2) **glance-spectacle + robustness** ŌĆö the additive, CPU-pooled, no-sort galaxy is the biggest visual wow AND the most self-contained/robust path; (3) **the "massively bigger concept"** reads instantly at a 10-s phone glance (a galaxy growing arms from his music). 556 + 558 banked as the alternate renderers for the new splat spine.

**Honesty carry-forward ŌĆö unverified surface (557):** (a) **the real-piano fetch** (`/api/audio/549fc519-ŌĆ”`) JSON-vs-bytes shape, CORS behind a CDN, and `decodeAudioData` on its codec are unconfirmed here ŌĆö the synth fallback is the guaranteed path. ## Cycle 404 ŌĆö 2026-06-12 (UTC) ┬Ę KIDS build (404 % 2 == 0) ┬Ę **WIDE** (3 orthogonal explorers) ┬Ę SHIPS `553-kids-tilt-fountain` ŌĆö **A 4-year-old TIPS the whole tablet to pour a stream of glowing orbs down through a 3D vertical garden of chimes, bells, and strings ŌĆö composing a singing waterfall by where they aim the flow. Tilt left/right/forward steers the cascade; each instrument-zone the orbs fall through rings a warm pentatonic note. Active, constructive play ŌĆö you AIM and BUILD a tune ŌĆö not another calm glow toy.**

**The build (winner `553`):** four interlocked subsystems + auto-demo. (1) **Tilt input + gravity model** ŌĆö `deviceorientation` (gamma=left/right, beta=front/back) ŌåÆ a smoothed (EMA ╬▒Ōēł0.08) 2D gravity vector applied to every orb; gravity never reverses (gy stays down). iOS 13+ permission via `DeviceOrientationEvent.requestPermission()` on the Start gesture; desktop fallback = pointer X/Y ŌåÆ gravity + arrow keys ŌåÆ incremental steer; denied/absent ŌåÆ `text-rose-300` notice + pointer fallback auto-activated. (2) **Orb physics + emitter** (`physics.ts`) ŌĆö a continuous emitter drips one orb / 100 ms from the top; Euler integration under the tilt-gravity; per-orb **AABB collision** against 5 instrument zones; **hard cap 180 live orbs**, retire at >12 s or below the floor, pool recycled each frame (no unbounded growth), slight drag (0.985) prevents runaway. *Discrete rigid orbs that trigger notes on contact ŌĆö NOT a simulated fluid/field whose statistics are sonified (the jury-banned GPU-physics-simŌåÆdrone move).* (3) **Zone-based spatial pentatonic synth** (`audio.ts`) ŌĆö 5 zones each a distinct timbre (bell = sine+partials; string = Karplus-ish noise-burst+resonant bandpass; chime = triangle├Ś1.5+overtone; marimba; low-bell); pitch varies by horizontal hit position; all C-major-pentatonic (always consonant, kid-safe); per-zone rate-limiting; master `gain ŌåÆ lowpass(8 kHz) ŌåÆ DynamicsCompressor(ŌłÆ10 dBFS, 20:1) ŌåÆ destination` brick-wall limiter; `setTargetAtTime` envelopes; AudioContext built in the Start gesture (iOS unlock, `window.AudioContext||webkitAudioContext`). (4) **three.js render** ŌĆö additive-emissive glowing orbs, 5 luminous zone-panels that flash when struck, dark Resonance background, glow via additive blending (no postprocessing dep); geometries/materials/renderer disposed on unmount. **Ghost-tilt auto-demo** ŌĆö a figure-8 synthetic tilt pours orbs + sings from frame one with zero permission/zero taps; cancels on real tilt/pointer; resumes after ~4 s idle (the 06:30 hands-free glance safety net). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + three.js ŌĆö no mic, camera, network, or secrets). **No new npm deps** (three@0.182 is an existing installed dependency, imported normally).

**Orient / git sync:** `git fetch` showed origin/main **force-updated** + local diverged 50/50 (`--ff-only` aborted ŌĆö the recurring container-drift, same as 363/368/371/376/385/403); local stale at an alt-lineage `2e98f5e`, origin authoritative at `1046d84` = cycle 403 `552-dream-house` ŌåÆ `git reset --hard origin/main` (max committed dream folder on disk **552**). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` MISSING in fresh container ŌåÆ `npm ci` (exit 0; package.json/lock untouched + excluded). Pre-allocated **553/554/555** to three builders (verified free; 550/551 are banked-seed slugs from cycle 403, left untouched).

- **Love-aware bias:** the loved kids embodied/mark-making cluster (`83-kids-tilt-rain`ŌØż’ĖÅ ŌĆö tilt; `100-kids-paint-song`ŌØż’ĖÅ/`158-kids-hum-paint`ŌØż’ĖÅ ŌĆö a child's action becoming a visible/audible thing) softly backs a tilt-driven constructive instrument; additive ŌĆö the jury + ambition/diversity gates governed.

## Cycle 403 ŌĆö 2026-06-12 (UTC) ┬Ę ADULT build (403 % 2 == 1) ┬Ę **DEEP** (3 approaches, one concept) ┬Ę SHIPS `552-dream-house` ŌĆö **The xenharmonic lattice comes ALIVE: a self-composing La Monte Young "Dream House" that slowly walks the just-intonation / BohlenŌĆōPierce Tonnetz on its own, sustains a pure-ratio drone, drifts forever via the comma pump (never returns home), and is audibly a different piece at minute 12 than minute 1 ŌĆö zero permission, runs itself.** Cycle 2 of the **Xenharmonic Drone** spine (`538-xenharmonic-lattice` = cycle 1, the static tap-a-Tonnetz piece the JURY 2026-06-12 explicitly named: *"capped at 3 only because it's a one-off ŌĆö make it a spine and it's the first 4"*). 538 was something you *tap*; 552 is a room you *leave running*.

**The build (winner `552`):** (1) **autonomous lattice walker** ŌĆö steps a neighbor (u┬▒1 fifths / v┬▒1 thirds) every 4ŌĆō8 s, biased toward unvisited nodes; the **syntonic comma (81/80 Ōēł 21.5┬ó)** guarantees loops never reclose, so the pitch drifts permanently. (2) **sustained pure-ratio drone** (`audio.ts`) ŌĆö current node + 2ŌĆō5 nearest neighbors held as a chord at EXACT rational ratios (never 12-TET); each voice = sine + 3rd/5th odd partials + a ~0.07 Hz detune-LFO shimmer; all attacks/releases via `setTargetAtTime` (3ŌĆō4 s TCs) so chords never hard-start ("Dream House" crossfade); voice pooling, per-voice gain `0.55/voiceCount`, **8-voice hard cap**, full osc/LFO cleanup on retire. (3) **the long-form arc (the headline)** ŌĆö an 8-phase ~14-min cycle (gatheringŌåÆascendingŌåÆfloweringŌåÆtritaveŌåÆradianceŌåÆdissolvingŌåÆrecedingŌåÆstillness) smoothstep-interpolating **density** (2Ōåö6 voices), a **drifting master lowpass** (700Ōåö4800 Hz), a **┬▒0.4-octave register breath**, and a **4-stop tuning migration** (5-JIŌåÆBŌĆōPŌåÆ19-EDOŌåÆback) ŌĆö so minute 12 differs from minute 1 in register, density, tuning-world, brightness AND absolute (comma-drifted) frequency. (4) **SVG Tonnetz render** ŌĆö nodes positioned by (u,v), active chord nodes glowing via `feGaussianBlur`, a **comet-trail** polyline of the walker's path + accumulating dim **visited-ghost dots** (VISIT_MAX=300) so the pilgrimage is *visible*; viewBox pans smoothly to follow the walker; rAF mutates SVG attributes directly (no per-frame React churn); HUD shows tuning, root ratio, voice count, **elapsed clock + phase word**. Optional **tap = "exhale"** (fade current chord, bloom a fresh region) ŌĆö purely additive; doing nothing is the default. Master `gain ŌåÆ drifting lowpass ŌåÆ DynamicsCompressor(20:1, ŌłÆ10 dBFS) ŌåÆ destination`; AudioContext built in the Start gesture (iOS unlock, `window.AudioContext||webkitAudioContext`). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + SVG ŌĆö no mic, camera, network, or secrets). **No new npm deps.**

**Orient / git sync:** `git fetch` showed local `main` diverged AGAIN (the recurring container-drift: local stale at a cycle-305 alt-lineage `2e98f5e`, origin authoritative at `e346ad4` = cycle 402 `549-kids-song-friend`); `--ff-only` aborted ŌåÆ `git reset --hard origin/main` (HEAD `e346ad4`; max committed dream folder on disk **549**). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` MISSING in fresh container ŌåÆ `npm ci` (exit 0; package.json/lock untouched + excluded). Pre-allocated **550/551/552** to three builders (verified free; 544/546/547/548 are banked-seed slugs from cycles 401/402, left untouched).

**Act ŌĆö DEEP fan-out (3 parallel folder-isolated sonnet builders, one concept ŌĆö *the xenharmonic lattice as a living, self-drifting, off-glass-steerable Dream House drone-pilgrimage* ŌĆö via three steering attacks; all share an autonomous-by-default core, comma-pump drift, sustained pure-ratio drone, SVG Tonnetz + comet-trail):** `552-dream-house` (pure autonomous long-form ~14-min arc ŌĆö **WINNER**) ┬Ę `550-xenharmonic-pilgrimage` (VOICE-steered: autocorrelation pitch ŌåÆ nearest-node pull, "tune yourself into the drift" ŌĆö complete, the most *musical/embodied*, lost: builder honestly flagged the autocorrelation detector as basic [octave-confusion/noise] ŌåÆ least-reliable steering, and 552 is more glance-robust) ┬Ę `551-tilt-pilgrimage` (TILT-steered: iOS-permission deviceorientation ŌåÆ fifths/thirds drift bias + desktop tilt-pad fallback ŌĆö complete, the most *physical*, lost: needs the iOS permission dance + a real device, a steering layer not a bigger swing). (3) **the bigger swing** ŌĆö a genuine 14-min stateful arc (the manual's "long-form generative: state, memory, evolution, NOT loops") is the most ambitious of the three and the only clean #1-*attempt*; voice/tilt are steering layers bolted onto the same core. (4) **build robustness** ŌĆö solid voice-pooling + gain-capping + brick-wall limiter, reviewed in `audio.ts`. 550 (voice grab-the-wheel) + 551 (tilt grab-the-wheel) banked as the explicit cycle-3 path.

**Validate:** banked both losers to IDEAS ┬¦403 ŌåÆ `rm -rf 550 551` ŌåÆ re-verified `git status` shows ONLY `552-dream-house/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**` (heeding ┬¦401's premature-completion-race lesson: both loser agents had COMPLETED and their folders were confirmed gone before the build) ŌåÆ `rm -rf .next` ŌåÆ authoritative `npm run build` with ONLY the winner ŌåÆ **exit 0, `Ō£ō Compiled successfully in 29.5s`, `Ō£ō Generating static pages (439/439)`** (438ŌåÆ439 = the one new route), `.next/server/app/dream/552-dream-house/page.js` confirmed prerendered. Build warnings are all pre-existing in unrelated `src/lib/*` files; **zero** in the winner folder. `package.json`/`package-lock.json`/`next.config.*` confirmed unchanged + excluded. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no audio device in this sandbox).

**Honesty carry-forward ŌĆö unverified surface (552):** (a) **does minute 12 actually FEEL different from minute 1** ŌĆö the arc is structurally sound (8 interpolated phases + tuning migration + register breath), but whether the perceptual journey lands over a real 14-min listen is the core unverified claim; the HUD phase-word/clock is the legibility crutch for a short glance. (b) **long-run gain / limiter interaction** ŌĆö voice gain is mathematically capped (`0.55/voiceCount`, 8-voice cap) and brick-walled, but a 20+ min session's compressor-release behavior isn't stress-tested. (c) **iOS AudioContext suspend on screen-lock** ŌĆö `ctx.resume()` is not wired to a tap-to-resume guard (the builder's own flagged risk); a long unattended phone session could suspend. (d) extreme octave-folded frequencies at far lattice positions (clamped 80ŌĆō520 Hz ├Ś register-shift, but perceptual balance unauditioned). (e) the README `<Link>` to `/dream/552-dream-house/README.md` 404s as a route (cosmetic, lab-wide pattern). Because it's fully autonomous with zero permission, the 06:30 glance reliably shows a drifting, glowing, singing pilgrimage with no setup ŌĆö the strongest glance-safety of any recent piece.

**Queued next + why:**

Standing jury ask remains the **4/5 chase** ŌĆö and the lab has now twice (401, 403) cleared #4 (spine) but missed #5 (no <14-day bind). The single highest-value move the lab keeps failing: a research dive that mines a genuinely <14-day client-buildable finding from the jury's named non-cs.SD wells (TouchDesigner/Tschepe/Heckmann, Anadol/Akten/Marpi show news, fal/replicate/HF drops, SIGGRAPH/Ars/MUTEK 2026 programs) and BINDS it ŌĆö that's the only path to the first honest 4/5 in eight juries.

- **Banked this fire (IDEAS ┬¦403):** `550-xenharmonic-pilgrimage` (voice-steered ŌĆö the most musical grab-the-wheel) + `551-tilt-pilgrimage` (tilt-steered ŌĆö the most physical).

## Cycle 402 ŌĆö 2026-06-12 (UTC) ┬Ę KIDS build (402 % 2 == 0) ┬Ę **DEEP** (3 approaches, one concept) ┬Ę SHIPS `549-kids-song-friend` ŌĆö **A creature whose body is literally MADE of the songs a child sings it ŌĆö it remembers the actual melodies (not a vague energy, not a timer) forever across calendar days, and sings them back, woven and changed, every visit.** Cycle 2 of the kids **Companion / Presence** spine (`518-kids-living-ember` = cycle 1): 518 remembered only humming *energy* within one session; here the friend remembers musical *content* across days and you can SEE it ŌĆö each song is a petal whose shape traces its pitch contour.

**The build (winner `549`):** (1) **forgiving voiceŌåÆpitch capture** ŌĆö `getUserMedia` ŌåÆ `AnalyserNode` ŌåÆ autocorrelation pitch detector tuned for a 4-year-old's high, breathy, wandering voice (clarity threshold + **babble-note fallback** so any vocalization still teaches a note); snaps to **C-major pentatonic** ~2 octaves; a melody = note-index array (cap 12; a ~1.2 s pause commits the song). (2) **cross-day melodic-memory engine** (`memory.ts`) ŌĆö `localStorage` (`resonance.dream.549`, try/catch): song library + visit count + monotonic `totalNotesEver` + `lastVisit` + simulated `day`; on load the friend GREETS ("you came back!"), is visibly bigger, and surfaces a new-calendar-day return. (3) **recall re-synthesis** (`audio.ts`) ŌĆö never raw playback: transpose + gently slow + **weave two different days' melodies** into soft counterpoint; warm pentatonic voice; kid-safe master `gain ŌåÆ lowpass 8 kHz ŌåÆ DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter (20:1, ŌłÆ10 dBFS) ŌåÆ destination; AudioContext built in the Start gesture (iOS unlock). (4) **the body IS the songs (SVG)** ŌĆö each remembered song is a petal/teardrop path whose vertical shape traces that melody's pitch contour, pentatonic degree ŌåÆ hue; a friendly face (blinking eyes, mouth that opens when it sings, the active petal pulses on each recalled note); idle breathing via direct rAF attribute mutation (no per-frame React re-render); `feGaussianBlur` glow. **Two demo affordances** (the reviewer can't wait until tomorrow): pre-seeded "yesterday's songs" so it sings hands-free from frame one with zero permission, AND an honestly-labelled **"Ō£© pretend it's tomorrow"** button that bumps the visit, regrows the body, and plays a transposed/slowed/woven recall instantly. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client: mic [local only, never recorded/uploaded] + Web Audio + SVG ŌĆö no network, no secrets). **No new npm deps.**

**Orient / git sync:** `git fetch` showed local `main` diverged AGAIN (the recurring container-drift: local stale at `2e98f5e`, origin force-updated to `01af318` = cycle 401 `545-motion-loom`); `--ff-only` aborted ŌåÆ `git reset --hard origin/main` (HEAD `01af318`; max committed dream folder on disk **545**). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` MISSING in fresh container ŌåÆ `npm ci` (exit 0; package.json/lock untouched + excluded). Pre-allocated **547/548/549** to three builders (verified free; 544/546 are banked-seed slugs from cycle 401, left untouched).

**Research-first dive (RESEARCH ┬¦402):** WebSearch across arxiv cs.SD (still server-side singing-synthesis ML ŌĆö the recurring honest read, #5 unclaimable from that well) and the kids voice-companion literature. Surfaced one genuinely-relevant fresh-ish finding ŌĆö a **2026 AccScience study** on children's *developmental* preferences for natural vs. synthetic voice agents (132 kids aged 4ŌĆō10; willingness-to-interact rises when the agent feels like a known, responsive presence). **#5 NOT claimed** ŌĆö "online-first 2026" date isn't verifiably <14 days, said plainly ŌĆö but it backs the design decision that a young child's bond with a voice companion deepens through *memory of content* (it knows your songs) rather than novelty, which is exactly 549's thesis and the differentiator from the timer-aged `322-kids-voice-garden`. **Chain visible:** dive (kids bond deepens via remembered content, not a clock; jury #6 names 518 to extend) ŌåÆ today's build.

**Decide ŌĆö gates cleared:**
- **mode: DEEP** ŌĆö JURY 2026-06-12 provocation **#6 explicitly names a kids piece to extend** ("518-living-ember is the one kids piece with memory that rewards return across days ŌĆö extend THAT ŌĆö a creature a child finds genuinely changed tomorrow"), which the orchestration guide says = go DEEP on X (this overrides the 401-was-DEEPŌåÆWIDE alternation; the jury naming a piece wins). ONE concept (a creature that remembers your *songs* across days) attacked via three render/embodiment approaches.

- **Ambition floor (winner `549`): 3/5 solid** ŌĆö `ambition: #2 Ōēź3 subsystems (voice/pitch capture + cross-day localStorage memory + recall re-synthesis + SVG contour-body = 4) + #3 named refs (Tamagotchi ŌĆö Aki Maita / Bandai 1996, the original persistent companion; Brian Eno long-form non-repeating) + #4 multi-cycle (Companion/Presence spine, cycle 2 ŌĆö the jury's #6 ask)`. **#1 made honestly as the contestable case** ŌĆö "remembering melodic *content* across calendar days, recalled as woven counterpoint, with the body literally drawn from the contours" is a genuine interaction-first for the lab, but **localStorage persistence itself is NOT lab-first** (`322-kids-voice-garden` already persists a calendar-aged creature; `71-shader-evolve` persists a gallery) ŌĆö so #1 discounts cleanly and the floor rests on #2+#3+#4. **#5 NOT claimed** (AccScience date not verifiably <14 days).
- **Diversity audit (JURY 2026-06-12 rolling-15 bans, applied):** `banned = [WebGPU-compute OUTPUT (4├Ś) ┬Ę Canvas2D OUTPUT (4├Ś) ┬Ę GPU-physics-simŌåÆdrone TECH (4├Ś) ┬Ę finger-on-glass INPUT (7├Ś) ┬Ę calm-sensory-kids VIBE (4├Ś)] ┬Ę picked(549) = [**voice/mic INPUT** (off-glass, NOT a finger ŌĆö the jury's most-over-represented reflex at 7├Ś) ┬Ę **SVG OUTPUT** (NOT Canvas2D, NOT WebGPU ŌĆö both banned at 4├Ś; and decisively NOT three.js, which `545` just shipped, so a three.js sibling would be 2-in-a-row) ┬Ę **pitch-detectionŌåÆpersistent-memoryŌåÆrecall TECH** (NOT a simulated-physical-field/GPU drone) ┬Ę **companion / relationship / it-remembers-you VIBE** (NOT calm-sensory-kids ŌĆö the differentiator is the bond/memory, exactly jury #6's point)]` ŌĆö **clean on every jury ban.**
- **Love-aware bias:** Karel's loved kids/voice cluster softly backs it ŌĆö `158-kids-hum-paint`ŌØż’ĖÅ, `322`-adjacent voice play, `100-kids-paint-song`ŌØż’ĖÅ, `104-kids-mirror-draw`ŌØż’ĖÅ (a child's voice/mark becoming a visible thing); additive ŌĆö the jury + ambition/diversity gates governed the pick.

**Act ŌĆö DEEP fan-out (3 parallel folder-isolated builders, one concept ŌĆö *a creature made of the songs you sing it, remembered across days* ŌĆö via three render attacks):** `549-kids-song-friend` (SVG body literally drawn from melodic contours + a face ŌĆö **WINNER**) ┬Ę `547-kids-songkeeper` (three.js glowing creature, each song an orbiting contour-strand ŌĆö complete, richest idle presence, lost on diversity: three.js 2-in-a-row + less legible than petals-with-a-face) ┬Ę `548-kids-songbloom` (raw WebGL2 GLSL bioluminescent shader grown from memory-seed uniforms ŌĆö complete, the freshest generative-shader-from-memory idea, lost: memoryŌåÆuniform-hash is the *least legible* "see your own songs," no face/character). Both losers banked as detailed **IDEAS ┬¦402** seeds.

**Curate ŌĆö why 549 won:** all three are the same "remembers your songs across days, sings them back woven" concept; the deciding axes were (1) **kid-legibility** ŌĆö 549's petals-each-tracing-a-song on a creature with a face is the most *concrete, readable* expression of "made of your songs" for a 4-year-old; 547's orbiting strands are more abstract and 548's shader-hash is the least readable connection between *this song* and *that shape*. (2) **diversity by the jury's own mechanical audit** ŌĆö SVG dodges the banned Canvas2D/WebGPU AND avoids a 2nd-consecutive three.js (545 just shipped it); 547 would have repeated the renderer. (3) **companion VIBE fidelity** (jury #6) ŌĆö a face that greets you and sings reads as a *relationship*; a full-screen shader (548) reads as an ambience. 547 + 548 banked.

**Validate:** banked both losers to IDEAS ┬¦402 ŌåÆ `rm -rf 547 548` ŌåÆ re-verified `git status` shows ONLY `549-kids-song-friend/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**` (heeding ┬¦401's premature-completion-race lesson: both loser agents had COMPLETED and their folders were confirmed gone before the build) ŌåÆ authoritative `npm run build` with ONLY the winner ŌåÆ **exit 0, `Ō£ō Compiled successfully`, `Ō£ō Generating static pages (438/438)`, `/dream/549-kids-song-friend 5.75 kB / 112 kB First Load` prerendered static.** Build warnings are all pre-existing in unrelated files; **zero** in the winner folder. `package.json`/`package-lock.json`/`next.config.*` confirmed unchanged + excluded. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no mic/audio in this sandbox).

**Honesty carry-forward ŌĆö unverified surface (549):** (a) **pitch accuracy on a REAL 4-year-old's voice is the core unknown** ŌĆö autocorrelation is octave-error-prone and a child's voice is breathy/noisy; the clarity threshold + babble-note fallback + pentatonic snapping hide a lot, but the capture timings (`silenceRms`, `MIN_NOTE_GAP`, the 1.2 s commit pause) want field tuning. (b) **SVG perf with a large library** ŌĆö each song adds a multi-point teardrop path under a `feGaussianBlur`; petal count is unbounded (note cap is 12/song, growth is bounded) so a child with dozens of songs over weeks could stress an old iPad's blur filter ŌĆö a cycle-3 cap/LOD is the obvious hardening. (c) the README `<Link>` points at `/dream/549-kids-song-friend/README.md` which 404s as a route (cosmetic, a lab-wide pattern ŌĆö does not break the build). (d) iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock. (e) the single `rafRef` is shared between idle-breathing and listening effects ŌĆö only one is ever live and unmount cancels it, but the dual ownership is slightly fragile. The pre-seeded memory + "pretend it's tomorrow" button are the safety nets so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows a friend made of songs, greeting + singing, and visibly growing ŌĆö with zero permission and no 24h wait.

**Queued next + why:**

Bind a fresh kids-voice-interaction finding here for the long-missing #5.

## Cycle 401 ŌĆö 2026-06-12 (UTC) ┬Ę ADULT build (401 % 2 == 1) ┬Ę **DEEP** (3 approaches, one concept) ┬Ę SHIPS `545-motion-loom` ŌĆö **The MOTION IN A ROOM conducts a Nancarrow polytempo canon: the left and right halves of the camera each carry their own moving rhythm ŌĆö extracted with NO machine learning, just optical motion energy ŌĆö and because two real-world motions never lock to a clean tempo ratio, the canon drifts forever and CANNOT be conducted into agreement.** Cycle 2 of `514-polytempo-loom` (the piece JURY 2026-06-12 explicitly named to extend): 514's five voices ran at *composer-chosen* fixed irrational ratios; here the two master tempi are **conducted by the room itself**, off the glass.

**The build:** (1) **no-ML motion extraction** ŌĆö `getUserMedia` ŌåÆ hidden 64├Ś48 offscreen canvas ŌåÆ per-pixel luma frame-difference accumulated for the LEFT vs RIGHT frame halves (two "conductors"), one motion-energy scalar per half per frame (no neural net / MediaPipe / WASM). (2) **autocorrelation tempo** ŌĆö each half's motion-energy buffers ~6 s; mean-subtracted autocorrelation finds the dominant lag in 40ŌĆō170 BPM ŌåÆ BPM, smoothed (ŽäŌēł1.5 s), **never quantized** so the two tempi form an irrational ratio by default. (3) **polytempo canon engine** ("A Tale of Two Clocks," Wilson 2013) ŌĆö 5 voices, 0ŌĆō1 on conductor A (├Ś1, ├Ś1/ŌłÜ2), 2ŌĆō4 on B (├Ś1, ├Ś1/Žå, ├ŚŽå/2); 25 ms `setInterval` + 120 ms lookahead, sample-accurate `osc.start(t)`; D-pentatonic 2-octave (zero harmonic tension ŌĆö all drama metric); sine+2.756├Ś bell timbre; master `gain ŌåÆ DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall (20:1, ŌłÆ12 dBFS) ŌåÆ destination; AudioContext in the Start gesture (iOS unlock; `window.AudioContext||webkitAudioContext`). (4) **three.js loom** ŌĆö 5 glowing `THREE.Line` threads whose vertices are BPM-phase-driven sinusoids (the visual drift IS the tempo drift) + 160 pooled node-pulse spheres on beat-onsets + slow camera orbit + Ikeda violet/blue/emerald/cyan/purple on #020208 + HTML readouts "Left X BPM / Right Y BPM / ratio ZŌĆ” ŌĆö never rational"; full dispose on unmount. **Ghost-motion auto-demo:** two synthetic motion signals at AŌēł72 / BŌēł72ŌłÜ2 BPM weave + drift from frame one with zero permission; room takes over on detected motion; resumes after ~4 s still. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client: Web Audio + camera [local only, never recorded/uploaded/networked] + three.js ŌĆö no mic, no secrets, no network writes). **No new npm deps** (`three`@0.182 already installed, imported normally ŌĆö not CDN, not added).

**Orient / git sync:** `git fetch` showed local `main` badly diverged AGAIN (the recurring container-drift: local stale at cycle 305 `2e98f5e`, origin force-updated to `bad6b3f` = "jury: verdict 2026-06-12", with cycle 400 `541-kids-liquid-light` at `49b29f7` just beneath it); `--ff-only` aborted ŌåÆ `git reset --hard origin/main` (HEAD `bad6b3f`; max committed dream folder on disk **541**). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` MISSING in this fresh container ŌåÆ `npm ci` (**exit 0 on the FIRST try this cycle**, 1455 pkgs; package.json/lock untouched + excluded). Pre-allocated **544/545/546** to three builders (verified free; **skipped 542/543** to avoid reusing last cycle's banked-slug numbers, per the established pattern).

**Research-first dive (RESEARCH ┬¦401):** WebSearch across arxiv beat-tracking (only 2017ŌĆō2022, server/RNN-side), conducting-gestureŌåÆtempo ("visual beats" = max velocity/acceleration of the ictus; foundational), and **spontaneous-motor-tempo science** (biorxiv 2025.09.14 "From Individual to Shared Tempo" + 2025.09.16 "Similarity in Spontaneous Tempo Impacts Flow ŌĆ” Joint Performance"). **#5 honestly NOT bindable** ŌĆö the SMT papers are the most *relevant* freshness in months (far more than this week's server-ML cs.SD) but at **~9 months they aren't <14 days**; said plainly even after heeding JURY provocation #5's "mine beyond cs.SD." **Decide ŌĆö gates cleared:**
- **mode: DEEP** ŌĆö JURY.md (read FIRST, per the manual) explicitly names a piece to extend ("take 514-polytempo-loom ŌĆ” to cycle 2"), which the orchestration guide says = go DEEP on X (this overrides the 400-was-DEEPŌåÆWIDE alternation; the jury naming wins). - **Diversity audit (JURY 2026-06-12 rolling-15 bans, applied):** `banned = [WebGPU-compute OUTPUT (4├Ś) ┬Ę Canvas2D OUTPUT (4├Ś) ┬Ę GPU-physics-simŌåÆdrone TECH (4├Ś) ┬Ę finger-on-glass INPUT (7├Ś) ┬Ę calm-sensory-kids VIBE (4├Ś)] ┬Ę picked(545) = [**camera-motion INPUT** (off-glass, NOT a finger, NOT ML) ┬Ę **three.js OUTPUT** (1├ŚŌåÆ2├Ś, the scarcest non-banned renderer ŌĆö and decisively NOT SVG, which is already 3├Ś and a sibling-ship would have pushed to 4├Ś, the next monoculture) ┬Ę **motionŌåÆautocorr-tempoŌåÆpolytempo-canon TECH** (NOT a simulated-physical-field/GPU drone ŌĆö the jury's banned meta-technique) ┬Ę **cerebral / Ikeda-clinical / metric-tension VIBE** (NOT calm-sensory-kids)]` ŌĆö **clean on every single jury ban.** The renderer choice was the deciding curation axis (see Curate).

**Act ŌĆö DEEP fan-out (3 parallel folder-isolated sonnet builders, one concept ŌĆö *conduct incommensurable tempi with your body* ŌĆö via three input├Śrender attacks):** `545-motion-loom` (no-ML optical-flow motion energy ŌåÆ three.js woven threads ŌĆö **WINNER**) ┬Ę `544-conductors-canon` (MediaPipe **Hands** two-hand conducting ŌåÆ SVG scrolling loom, 514's exact visual lineage ŌĆö complete, careful self-report, lost on the diversity audit: SVG already 3├Ś ŌåÆ a ship makes it 4├Ś) ┬Ę `546-clock-canon` (MediaPipe **Pose** full-body two-arm conducting ŌåÆ SVG **orbital phase-clock** idiom: dots that sweep + never realign ŌĆö complete, the fresh-visual-idiom resurrect).
