(4) **#1 cleanliness** ŌĆö 545's "tempo from optical motion, no ML" is a marginally more defensible cross-modal first than 544/546's "beat detection from a tracked landmark." 544 (precision/514-continuity) + 546 (orbital-clock idiom) banked; **both their builder agents had COMPLETED before any folder removal** (see Validate ŌĆö there WAS a delayed-flush race this cycle, handled).

**Validate:** removed 544/546 folders ŌåÆ authoritative `npm run build` with the winner ŌåÆ **exit 0**. THEN discovered **546's folder had re-appeared** fully written (its earlier "completed" notification was premature ŌĆö page.tsx+README flushed *after* my first empty check and after my first `rm`); since 546 had been present during that first build, I **`rm -rf`'d it definitively** (confirmed gone, agent since completed so no further writes) and **re-ran the authoritative build with ONLY `545` present** ŌåÆ **exit 0, `Ō£ō Compiled successfully in 105s`, `Ō£ō Generating static pages (437/437)`, `/dream/545-motion-loom 5.71 kB / 294 kB First Load` prerendered static** (the 294 kB First Load is the three.js bundle, in line with `537`/`432`). Builder self-reported `tsc --noEmit` 0 errors + `eslint --max-warnings=0` clean on the folder. `git status` clean: only `545-motion-loom/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**` modified; `package.json`/`package-lock.json`/`next.config.*` confirmed unchanged + excluded. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no camera/WebGL/audio in this sandbox).

**Honesty carry-forward ŌĆö unverified surface (545):** (a) **whether autocorrelation on REAL room motion yields a musically-meaningful tempo** ŌĆö the autocorrelator returns *a* BPM even for near-random motion, so noisy/moderate-motion scenes may read erratically until the 6 s buffer fills; this is the CORE interaction's fidelity and the single most important thing to check live (the ghost-motion auto-demo masks it for the hands-free glance, but a real conductor's experience hinges on it). (b) WebGL `linewidth>1` is not honored on most drivers ŌåÆ threads render ~1px not as glowing ribbons (the node-pulse spheres carry the glow; cycle-3 fix = `Line2`/`LineMaterial`). (c) O(n┬▓) autocorr per video frame ŌĆö fine on desktop, may need batching to every 5th frame on low-end mobile. (d) iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock. (e) node-pool wraps at 160 simultaneous pulses (artifacts only at 170 BPM ├Ś 5). The ghost-motion auto-demo is the safety net so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows a weaving, drifting, (post-Start) singing canon with zero permission.

**Queued next + why:**
- **Cycle 402 (kids, even):** alternation says WIDE next (401 was DEEP), unless the next jury again names a piece.
- **545 cycle-3 deepening (the polytempo "conducted-canon" spine):** swap `THREE.Line` ŌåÆ `Line2`/`LineMaterial` so the threads are real glowing ribbons; **gate the BPM update on autocorr peak *confidence*** (only accept a tempo when the autocorrelation peak is sharp ŌĆö hold last value otherwise) so noisy rooms don't read erratically (the key live-risk fix); add a **phase-proximity heatmap** (514's own cycle-2 hook) as a background luminance that brightens on near-alignments; consider a **two-person** framing (left half = person 1, right half = person 2 ŌĆö literally two conductors who can't agree, the SMT science made interactive). The chase-the-4/5 path the jury keeps naming: take THIS to cycle 3 AND bind a genuinely <14-day finding in the same fire.
- **Banked this fire (IDEAS ┬¦401):** `544-conductors-canon` (MediaPipe Hands ŌåÆ SVG loom ŌĆö the precision/514-continuity resurrect; near-shippable, promote first if Karel wants the literal "conduct the loom with my hands" or if three.js underperforms) + `546-clock-canon` (MediaPipe Pose ŌåÆ SVG orbital phase-clock ŌĆö the fresh-visual-idiom resurrect; the clock-hands-that-never-realign visual is its own strong concept).
- **Carried open spines:** Polytempo/conducted-canon (514ŌåÆ545), Living Earth (502), Companion/Presence (518), Granular (520), Together (505/508), Hand-as-creature (524), Genre-Arc (526), Drawing-ML (529), Cross-synthesis/his-real-music (532), Living-flock (537), Xenharmonic (538), Liquid-light kids (541).

The build still passed (caught it after), but the safe rule is now: **before the authoritative build, re-verify `git status` shows ONLY the winner + docs, and `rm -rf` any re-appeared loser folder; re-run the build if a loser was present during the prior run.** Applied this cycle; final build clean with only 545.
- **Jury alignment (2026-06-12):** directly answers the headline ŌĆö takes the jury-named **514** to **cycle 2** (provocation #1, the ceiling-chase) as a **conducted tempo-canon** (provocation #4, the second time-tension piece, now embodied), on the **scarcest non-banned renderer** (three.js, dodging the SVG-would-hit-4├Ś trap AND the banned Canvas2D/WebGPU), with **NO simulated-physical-field** (dodging the banned GPU-physics-drone meta-technique) and **off-glass non-finger input** (dodging the 7├Ś finger-on-glass reflex). ## Cycle 400 ŌĆö 2026-06-12 12:26 UTC ┬Ę KIDS build (400 % 2 == 0) ┬Ę **DEEP** (3 approaches, one concept) ┬Ę SHIPS `541-kids-liquid-light` ŌĆö **A 4-year-old finger-paints a dark pool of living liquid light, and the liquid SINGS as it swirls.** Drag a finger and you inject swirling colored dye into a *real fluid simulation*; the speed and direction of the swirl drive a warm, ever-evolving pentatonic wash. No goal, no words, no wrong move ŌĆö infinite calm sensory play, with a hands-free "ghost finger" wandering the pool from frame one.

**Primary renderer = WebGPU compute (WGSL):** a real-time **stable-fluids (Jos Stam, SIGGRAPH 1999)** solver on a 192├Ś192 `rgba16float` grid ŌĆö add-forces (finger impulse + Gaussian dye injection) ŌåÆ semi-Lagrangian advect velocity ŌåÆ divergence ŌåÆ **28-iter Jacobi pressure solve** (ping-pong) ŌåÆ subtract-gradient (divergence-free projection) ŌåÆ advect dye ŌĆö then a full-screen-triangle render pipeline tone-maps the dye to luminous glow on dark. **Graceful degradation:** `navigator.gpu` missing / adapter-device-context failure ŌåÆ a Canvas2D **"lite fluid"** (a few thousand glowing dye particles advected by coarse curl-noise + finger impulse, additive `"lighter"` over a fading dark trail) + a `text-rose-300` "Playing in lite mode Ō£©" notice ŌĆö still swirls, still sings; this is the iPad safety net (iOS Safari WebGPU is recent/uneven). **Sonification:** swirl-speed ŌåÆ lowpass brightness + voice count; vertical position ŌåÆ **C-major pentatonic** register (C3ŌĆōC5, nothing ever wrong); additive triangle/sine wash with `setTargetAtTime` glides; always-on C2+G2 breathing pad (never silent); kids-safe master `gain ŌåÆ lowpass(Ōēż8 kHz) ŌåÆ DynamicsCompressor(ŌłÆ6 dB, 20:1 brick-wall) ŌåÆ destination`; AudioContext built inside the Start gesture (iOS unlock, `window.AudioContext || webkitAudioContext`). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + WebGPU/Canvas ŌĆö no mic/camera/network/secrets). **No new npm deps.**

**Orient / git sync:** `git fetch` showed local `main` badly diverged again (the recurring container-drift: local stale at cycle 305 `2e98f5e`, origin force-updated to cycle 399 `9e96178` = `538-xenharmonic-lattice`); `--ff-only` aborted ŌåÆ `git reset --hard origin/main` (HEAD `9e96178`; max committed folder on disk **538**). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` MISSING in this fresh container ŌåÆ `npm ci` (FIRST run hit a transient network failure that left node_modules wiped + `next` not found at build time; a SECOND `npm ci` succeeded cleanly, exit 0, 1455 pkgs ŌĆö package.json/lock untouched). Pre-allocated **541/542/543** to three builders (verified free; 539/540 are banked *text* seeds from ┬¦399, NOT folders ŌĆö skipped to avoid number reuse).

The actionable read: a grep audit confirmed the tension/time/tuning lanes the recent juries keep daring are already *spent* ŌĆö phasing/Reich/tempo-canon/polytempo all exist (302/375/514/371), cymatics (19/165/360), reaction-diffusion (9), granular (18/227), GPU-fluid (3/15/84/433). ## Cycle 398 ŌĆö 2026-06-12 (UTC) ┬Ę KIDS build (398 % 2 == 0) ┬Ę **DEEP** (3 approaches, one concept) ┬Ę SHIPS `537-kids-sky-murmuration` ŌĆö **The child looks UP into a deep 3D dusk sky where a real murmuration of thousands of glowing starlings swirls in volumetric depth ŌĆö birds near and far, the whole cloud breathing and turning ŌĆö and the murmuration SINGS; a finger gently shepherds it, and when the cloud splits into sub-flocks you HEAR it split into harmony, resolving back to a chord when it re-merges.** A living weather of birds you stand under. **three.js** `THREE.Points` cloud (~2.5ŌĆō4k points, additive blending, soft sprite, depth-coded colour near-warm/far-violet, ExpFog, a slowly drifting camera so depth reads), driven by an **emergent 3D boids engine** (Reynolds separation/alignment/cohesion, spatial-hash neighbour lookups, boundary avoidance) in `flock.ts`. **Emergent flock state ŌåÆ harmony** (the murmuration literally sings): cohesion/alignment-order ŌåÆ harmonic richness & consonance (tight calm cloud = warm settled chord; scattered swirl = brighter, more voices, sparkle); centroid height (Y) ŌåÆ pentatonic register; up to 4 spatial clusters detected every ~200 ms (`computeClusters`, grid-bucket) each sustain their OWN pentatonic voice so a **split is audible as a new interval and a merge resolves toward unison/octave** ŌĆö the magic; mean speed/turbulence ŌåÆ gentle tremolo + airy wash. C-major pentatonic so nothing is ever wrong; always-on C2+G2 ambient pad; master `gain ŌåÆ lowpass(8 kHz, kids-safe) ŌåÆ DynamicsCompressor(ŌłÆ6 dB, 18:1) ŌåÆ destination`, all `setTargetAtTime`. AudioContext built inside the Start gesture (iOS unlock; `window.AudioContext || webkitAudioContext`). **Always-on auto-demo:** a scripted 3D "ghost shepherd" wanders a Lissajous path and a second attractor phases in/out on a ~12 s cycle so the cloud **visibly divides into harmonising flocks and re-merges, camera drifting, from frame one with zero permission** ŌĆö the hands-free 06:30 phone glance always shows a swirling, singing, splitting murmuration; cancels on first pointer-down, resumes after ~4 s idle. **Degradation:** three.js/WebGL context fail ŌåÆ `text-rose-300` notice + a Canvas2D 2D dot-flock (CPU boids ~300) that still flocks + sings; audio always continues; geometry/material disposed on unmount. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + three.js ŌĆö no mic, camera, network, or secrets). **No new npm deps** (three@0.182 is already an installed repo dependency ŌĆö imported normally, NOT via CDN, NOT added).

Refs: Reynolds 1987 / Cavagna PNAS 2010 / Hamilton "Selfish Herd" 1971. **Ambition 3/5** (#2+#3+#4). **Didn't win:** technically the most ambitious (a real GPU flocking sim), but it self-flags genuine **iOS-Safari fragility** (`texStorage2D RGBA32F` neighbour texture + `PIXEL_PACK_BUFFER`/`getBufferSubData` readback) on the very iPad Karel reviews on, and WebGL2 is 2├ŚŌåÆ3├Ś where three.js is 0├Ś. The strongest **technical** bank ŌĆö resurrect when we want the GPU-sim-at-scale ambition (5ŌĆō10k agents).
- **`536-kids-lantern-shoal` (banked ŌåÆ IDEAS ┬¦398, folder `rm -rf`'d)** ŌĆö the **Canvas2D friendly-character** approach (~380 lantern-fish with eyes/tails, spatial-hash boids, touch + tilt "current," k-means clusters ŌåÆ voices). Refs: Reynolds 1987 / Partridge 1982 fish-schooling. **Ambition 3/5** (#2+#3+#4). **Didn't win on DIVERSITY, not quality:** it's the **best literal-4yo legibility** of the three (individual friends you can see moving together), but Canvas2D is already 3├Ś in the rolling-10 ŌĆö shipping it pushes Canvas2D to **4├Ś**, the exact monoculture trap I flagged. Out on the diversity gate. Strong bank for when Canvas2D is scarce again, or fold its character-art into 537.

**Curate (why 537 won):** for a **kids DEEP** cycle judged via a hands-free 06:30 phone glance, all three are the same magical concept on three attacks. 537 wins on the deciding axes: (1) **diversity** ŌĆö three.js is the **single scarcest renderer (0├Ś rolling-10)**, so it diversifies hardest and dodges the Canvas2D/SVG 4├Ś trap that 536 would trigger; (2) **"massively bigger" / awe** ŌĆö true 3D volumetric depth (near/far birds, drifting camera, fog) is the biggest, most awe-inducing swing, exactly Karel's directive, where 535 is 2D points and 536 is 2D character-art; (3) **robustness on the review device** ŌĆö the standard `THREE.Points` path is battle-tested on iOS Safari where 535's float-texture + PBO-readback GPU path is self-flagged fragile; 537 reports zero TS/ESLint and authoritative build passed; (4) **glance** ŌĆö the ghost-shepherd split/merge animates + sings from frame one with no permission, with a Canvas2D fallback so it's never blank. 535 (GPU-sim technical bank) + 536 (Canvas2D legibility bank) banked as detailed IDEAS ┬¦398 seeds; folders `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative build.

**Validate:** the two non-winner **builder agents were still running** and kept re-creating their folders after I removed them (a folder-isolation race the orchestration guide warns about) ŌĆö first authoritative build FAILED on `Module not found: ./shoal` because 536's agent had re-written `page.tsx` post-deletion. **Resolved correctly (not a code fix ŌĆö a process fix, no winner-folder change):** `TaskStop` on both non-winner agents (535/536) ŌåÆ removed both folders ŌåÆ `rm -rf .next` ŌåÆ authoritative `npm run build` with ONLY `537` (+ the already-committed `532`) present ŌåÆ **exit 0, "Ō£ō Compiled successfully in 83s", "Ō£ō Generating static pages (434/434)", `ŌŚŗ /dream/537-kids-sky-murmuration 6.21 kB / 297 kB First Load` prerendered static.** (The 297 kB First Load is the three.js bundle ŌĆö in line with the lab's other three.js routes, e.g. `/dream/432-three-body`.) `git status` clean: only `537-kids-sky-murmuration/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**` modified; `package.json`/`package-lock.json`/`next.config.*` confirmed unchanged + excluded. (The `src/lib/*` lines in the build log are pre-existing ESLint *warnings*, not errors.) **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no three.js/WebGL/audio in this sandbox).

**Queued next + why:**
- **Cycle 399 (adult, odd):** alternation says WIDE next (398 was DEEP).
- **537 cycle-2 deepening (the "living flock that sings" spine):** fold in **536's friendly character-art** (give the points eyes/tails so a 4yo reads individual birds) and/or **535's GPU transform-feedback** so the count can climb to 8ŌĆō10k birds; add a predator (a hawk shadow the flock parts around ŌåÆ a tension swell that resolves); let two children each shepherd a sub-flock that harmonise (the "Together" spine crossover); verify the cluster-voice salience is audibly distinct on a phone speaker (the key unverified surface ŌĆö the cluster threshold may need tuning).
- **Banked this fire:** `535-kids-starling-choir` (raw WebGL2 GPU transform-feedback boids ŌĆö the technical resurrect for scale) + `536-kids-lantern-shoal` (Canvas2D friendly-character shoal ŌĆö the legibility resurrect / character-art donor for 537).
- **Carried open spines:** Living Earth (502), Companion/Presence (518), Granular (520), Together (505/508), Metric/Time (514), Hand-as-creature (524), Genre-Arc (526), Drawing-comes-alive/browser-ML (529), Cross-synthesis/his-real-music (532), Living-flock (537), Wave-Field (478/489). Banked text seeds still open: `533-hollow` (comb/phase-cancellation tension, three.js) + `534-third-ear` (Tartini difference-tone phantom melody).

**Notes:**
- **No API route / no `guard`** ŌĆö pure client Web Audio + three.js; no mic/camera/network/secrets. Within the scope fence. **No new npm deps** (three@0.182 is an existing installed dependency, imported normally ŌĆö not a CDN import, not added to package.json).
- **Honesty carry-forward:** 537 is **build-verified, NOT browser-verified.** Unverified surface (per builder + my read): (a) **cluster-voice salience** ŌĆö whether 2ŌĆō4 simultaneous sustained pentatonic voices read as an audibly distinct *split ŌåÆ merge* on a phone speaker behind the limiter (the cluster-detection threshold may need tuning; the single most important thing to check live); (b) whether ~2.5ŌĆō4k `THREE.Points` + per-frame CPU boids holds Ōēź30 fps on an older iPad (the Canvas2D ~300-agent fallback covers the worst case); (c) iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock + `webkitAudioContext`; (d) whether the slow camera drift gives enough parallax for 3D depth to read on a small phone screen vs an iPad. The ghost-shepherd auto-demo + Canvas2D dot-flock fallback are the safety nets so absent GPU never blocks the 06:30 glance.
- **Process learning (logged for the orchestration playbook):** spawning async builders and then `rm -rf`-ing a non-winner folder while its agent is *still running* races the agent's own Write tool ŌĆö it re-creates the folder and the authoritative build then fails on the half-written loser. **Fix:** before removing any non-winner folder, `TaskStop` its builder agent (or wait for its completion notification) ŌĆö only THEN `rm -rf`. Applied this cycle after the first build failed; second build clean.
- **Jury alignment:** answers the standing "massively bigger / too similar" mandate with a genuinely **bigger concept** (a 3D volumetric singing murmuration) on the **scarcest renderer** (three.js, 0├Ś rolling-10), in a **JOYFUL/awe** register that dodges the now-4├Ś "solitary-never-resolves" VIBE AND the Canvas2D/SVG 4├Ś trap, and steers OFF yesterday's drawing-ML theme; the dive *steered* honestly (cs.SD = server-ML + grep-audit "easy kids #1s spent" ŌåÆ bigger-concept-on-scarce-renderer) rather than manufacturing a #1 or #5. One commit, prefix `dream: cycle 398:`.

## Cycle 397 ŌĆö 2026-06-12 (UTC) ┬Ę ADULT build (397 % 2 == 1) ┬Ę **WIDE** (3 divergent explorers) ┬Ę SHIPS `532-vocoder-veil` ŌĆö **You sing or speak, and your words come out played by Karel's REAL Welcome Home piano ŌĆö your voice as the shape, his recorded piano as the voice.** The lab's **FIRST channel vocoder** (grep-verified: `vocoder` = 0├Ś across ~360 built prototypes ŌĆö only an INDEX mention, never a built piece). A classic Homer-Dudley **16-band analysis/synthesis filterbank**: the live mic (modulator) is split into 16 log-spaced bandpass bands (120 HzŌĆō7 kHz); each band's energy is followed (squared via a `WaveShaperNode` x┬▓ curve ŌåÆ smoothed by a ~20 Hz lowpass) and that audio-rate envelope is connected directly into the `.gain` AudioParam of the matching band on the CARRIER ŌĆö **Karel's actual piano recording**, fetched read-only from `/api/audio/549fc519-f7fc-4c38-a771-adaad2edbc81` (the confirmed WH track id used by 283/165), looped as an `AudioBufferSourceNode`. A **WebGL2 band-ladder** (16 glowing EQ rungs) animates from the modulator envelopes. **Auto-demo (no permission needed):** on load a built-in vowel-cycle modulator (saw + peaking formant filters cycling ahŌåÆeeŌåÆohŌåÆooŌåÆmm) drives the vocoder so the piano audibly *sings vowels* and the ladder animates with zero interaction ŌĆö the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows/sounds life before any mic grant. **Three-layer graceful degradation:** mic denied ŌåÆ `text-rose-300` note, auto-demo keeps running; piano fetch 404/CORS/offline ŌåÆ `text-amber-300` note + a 6-voice detuned saw/square synth carrier (vocoder still fully works); no WebGL2 ŌåÆ Canvas2D ladder + badge. ## Cycle 396 ŌĆö 2026-06-12 (UTC) ┬Ę KIDS build (396 % 2 == 0) ┬Ę **DEEP** (3 approaches, one concept) ┬Ę SHIPS `529-kids-doodle-choir` ŌĆö **A 4-year-old draws a simple doodle with their finger; a real in-browser neural net recognizes WHAT they drew; the drawing then comes alive ŌĆö animates and SINGS its own warm little motif ŌĆö and stays on the page as part of a growing, gently-looping CHOIR of singing creatures.** The lab's **FIRST use of TensorFlow.js / any ML recognition** in ~360 prototypes (grep-verified: zero `@tensorflow`/`tfjs` anywhere). TF.js is loaded via **CDN dynamic import** (`@tensorflow/tfjs@4/+esm`, `webpackIgnore` so Next never bundles it ŌĆö the `493`/MediaPipe pattern, no npm dep); the drawing canvas is rasterized to 28├Ś28 grayscale and run through **DoodleNet** (yining1023 ŌĆö a CNN trained on Google's Quick, Draw! 345-category dataset, ported to TF.js), whose top-1 class is mapped to one of **8 storybook archetypes** (sun / fish / bird / plant / cloud / star / critter / home), each with its own Canvas2D animation (rises & pulses / wiggles / flutters / sways / drifts / twinkles / bounces / breathes) and a distinct warm motif in **C major / C pentatonic** so nothing ever sounds wrong together. Each creature keeps its faint original stroke visible and loops its motif into the choir. A scripted **ghost-finger auto-demo** traces sunŌåÆfishŌåÆbirdŌåÆplantŌåÆstarŌåÆcritterŌåÆcloudŌåÆhome on load ŌĆö **before any drawing, and bypassing the async classifier entirely (it assigns the intended archetype directly)** ŌĆö so a hands-free 06:30 phone glance ALWAYS shows animated, singing creatures even if the model never loads. **Two-layer graceful degradation:** TF.js/model fail (network blocked / CDN change) ŌåÆ a hand-coded **geometric heuristic classifier** (bounding box / ink density / aspect ratio) keeps it fully playable with a `text-rose-300` "ŌŚł shape matching" badge; Canvas2D absent ŌåÆ a notice. Master chain `gain ŌåÆ lowpass(Ōēż7.8 kHz) ŌåÆ DynamicsCompressor(ŌłÆ6 dB, 20:1) ŌåÆ destination`; all envelopes `setTargetAtTime`; AudioContext built inside the Start gesture (iOS unlock). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + Canvas2D; the only network is the public TF.js CDN + the public DoodleNet model ŌĆö no mic, camera, secrets, or writes). **No new npm deps.**

**Orient / git sync:** `git fetch` showed local `main` badly diverged again ŌĆö local at **cycle 305** (`2e98f5e`), origin at **cycle 395** (`e4fdecb` = `526-jazz-room`); diverged 50/50, `--ff-only` aborted (the recurring container-drift pattern: 363/368/371/376/386/387/389/392/393/394/395) ŌåÆ `git reset --hard origin/main` (HEAD `e4fdecb`; max committed folder on disk **526**). A real **generative jazz-theory engine** (`jazz.ts`, 391 lines): F Jazz Blues 12-bar changes, **Bill Evans Type A/B rootless voicings** (3-7-9 / 7-9-3 shells) with distance-minimizing voice-leading between successive chords, a four-beat **walking bass** (rootŌåÆ5thŌåÆ3rdŌåÆchromatic-approach-on-beat-4), **2:1 swing** timing. A **lookahead scheduler** (25 ms interval, 120 ms horizon off `audioCtx.currentTime`) drives plucked-string bass (tri+sawŌåÆlowpass), an FM Rhodes-ish comping voice, and brushed drums (filtered-noise brushes + sine-sweep kick + ride). A **Canvas2D** smoky-club scene (deep brown-black, warm amber spotlight, three glowing bass/piano/drum presences that pulse + radiate rings on note onsets, drifting smoke, chord + phase HUD) plays itself from the first frame, so a hands-free 06:30 phone glance always shows a swinging, glowing scene. Optional **sit-in** keyboard (9 F-blues keys) adds a melody voice on top. AudioContext built in the Start gesture (iOS unlock); `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter (ŌłÆ6 dB / 20:1). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + Canvas2D ŌĆö no mic, camera, network, or secrets). - **Honesty carry-forward:** 526 is **build-verified, NOT browser-verified.** Unverified surface (per builder + my read): (a) the FM Rhodes timbre (7├Ś mod ratio) + exact swing *feel* at 132 BPM have never been heard ŌĆö may need a `modGain`/swing micro-tune; (b) the `chooseSmoothVoicing` distance metric uses note-index rather than true SATB voice assignment, so voice-leading is *approximately* smooth, not strictly; (c) whether the 5-phase arc reads as a *performance* (vs. a loop) on a phone glance behind the limiter; (d) iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock + the `ctx2d.scale()`-on-resize compounding the builder flagged; (e) particle cap (120) jank on low-end. All-synthesis/no-network means it ALWAYS plays on load ŌĆö that's the safety net for the 06:30 glance.
- **#5 honestly NOT claimed** (no <14-day finding implemented ŌĆö frontier is server-ML + WebGPU; said plainly per jury 2026-06-10). The freshness is the **diversify-off-saturated-WebGPU + Karel's-starved-genre-arc** read ŌåÆ the lab's first jazz instrument.

## Cycle 394 ŌĆö 2026-06-11 (UTC) ┬Ę KIDS build (394 % 2 == 0) ┬Ę **DEEP** (3 renderers, one concept) ┬Ę SHIPS `524-kids-hand-firebird` ŌĆö **Hold up your hand and it becomes a glowing firebird of light ŌĆö a creature made of ~2000 additively-blended GPU particles that gathers around your fingers, blooms wide and SINGS when you open your hand, and gathers into a quiet ember when you close it.** The lab's **first MediaPipe Hands** (21-landmark hand-tracking) piece ŌĆö the lab used MediaPipe *Pose* once (`493-kids-feeling-forest`) but **never Hands** (grep-clean: `HandLandmarker`/`hand-landmark`/"MediaPipe Hands" = 0├Ś before this). A **raw WebGL2** particle system (2000 points, additive blending, comet trails via a fade-feedback pass) is attracted to the live hand landmarks; **openness** (avg fingertip distance from palm, normalized by hand span) ŌåÆ bloom width + sung-voice trigger + brightness; **wrist height** ŌåÆ pitch (up = higher, quantized to C-major pentatonic so nothing is wrong); **finger spread** ŌåÆ scatter width + harmonic content; **movement speed** ŌåÆ sparkle/trail intensity. Warm pentatonic Web-Audio voice + an always-on detuned-sine ambient pad so it's never silent; master through a `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter (ŌłÆ6 dB / 20:1) + Ōēż8 kHz lowpass (kids-safe), all `setTargetAtTime` envelopes. A **scripted virtual hand** (fistŌåÆopen-bloomŌåÆcloseŌåÆflutter, ~8 s loop) drives the firebird + voice **on load before any camera permission** and resumes after 3.5 s of no hand ŌĆö so the 06:30 hands-free phone glance always shows a glowing, singing creature with zero interaction and zero camera. `navigator.mediaDevices`/MediaPipe-CDN/WebGL2 absent or camera denied ŌåÆ `text-rose-300` notice + a Canvas2D glow fallback that still sings + the auto-demo keeps running. AudioContext built in the Start gesture (iOS unlock). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + WebGL2; camera is local hand-landmark analysis only ŌĆö never recorded/uploaded; no network beyond the MediaPipe model CDN, no secrets). **No new npm deps** ŌĆö MediaPipe loaded via CDN dynamic ESM import (the established lab pattern from `493`/`444`), raw WebGL2, no three.js.

## Cycle 393 ŌĆö 2026-06-11 (UTC) ┬Ę ADULT build (393 % 2 == 1) ┬Ę **WIDE** (3 divergent explorers) ┬Ę SHIPS `520-singing-dune` ŌĆö **One living dune of sand, under its own gravity. You tip the world; it avalanches and finds a new angle of repose ŌĆö forever, never the same. The dune's own internal motion IS the sound (the real "song of dunes").** The lab's **first actual continuum simulation**: a **WebGPU compute MLS-MPM** (Moving Least Squares Material Point Method) granular solid ŌĆö 6k particles on a 128┬▓ grid, 5 compute passes/substep (clearGrid ŌåÆ P2G ŌåÆ gridUpdate ŌåÆ G2P ŌåÆ render), APIC affine momentum + a simplified Drucker-Prager plasticity so the sand *piles and avalanches* instead of splashing like water. Gravity comes from **device-orientation tilt** (gamma/beta ŌåÆ gravity vector; pointer-drag + arrow-key fallbacks on desktop ŌĆö the mental model is "tip the world," never tap/paint). The dune's aggregate physics drives a **booming-dune granular drone**: kinetic energy ŌåÆ drone density + filter cutoff; mean grain shear ŌåÆ a low fundamental (72ŌåÆ108 Hz JI) that bends up during an avalanche and sinks back at repose; avalanche impulses ŌåÆ soft filtered grain bursts. No harmonic progression ŌĆö the drama is entirely in the sand's motion; **no goal, no win, no resolve button.** `navigator.gpu` absent (incl. iOS Safari mid-2026) ŌåÆ a **CPU MLS-MPM** fallback (2k particles, 64┬▓ grid, mpm88-style quadratic B-spline weights + APIC C-matrix, Canvas2D point render) that runs **on load** with no interaction, so a hands-free 06:30 phone glance always shows a settling, sounding dune. AudioContext built in the **wake the dune** gesture (iOS unlock); `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter (ŌłÆ6 dB / 20:1). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + WebGPU; no mic, camera, network, or secrets). No new npm deps (`@webgpu/types` is existing dev-only typing).

Worked directly on main. `node_modules` MISSING in this fresh container ŌåÆ `npm ci` (exit 0 from existing lockfile; package.json/lock untouched + excluded). **Act ŌĆö WIDE 3-explorer adult fire (orchestrated, 3 folder-isolated sonnet builders spawned concurrently in one message; each fully self-contained, own folder, no git, no shared docs, no API route; THREE orthogonal "one presence" concepts, each dodging every banned tag via different input├Śoutput├Śtechnique):**

A strong resurrect ŌĆö the cleanest real-world-data one-presence seed in the bank.

Humming (mic RMS envelope, ANY voice, no pitch matching) raises the feed rate + deposits permanent V-seeds that bloom warm Turing fingers; **memory is monotonic** (`cumulativeHum` never decremented). Two banks of 4 **incommensurate LFOs** (irrational-ratio frequencies ŽĆ/e/ŌłÜ2/Žå over a 300 s base period) drift the f/k rates through the Gray-Scott zoo so minute 5 ŌēĀ second 30 and it **never loops back**. ## Cycle 391 ŌĆö 2026-06-11 (UTC) ┬Ę ADULT build (391 % 2 == 1) ┬Ę **WIDE** (3 divergent explorers) ┬Ę SHIPS `514-polytempo-loom` ŌĆö **Five voices, identical consonant pitches, simultaneously different IRRATIONAL tempo ratios (1, ŌłÜ2, Žå, e/2, ŽĆ/2) ŌĆö drifting eternally out of and toward phase, never landing a shared downbeat. The only tension lives in TIME.** A polytempo / tempo-canon lattice in the lineage of **Conlon Nancarrow's _Studies for Player Piano_** (Study No. 40 "Transcendental" = canon e:ŽĆ; his ŌłÜ2 canons, where layers share no common period so true convergence is effectively never). All five voices play the same pentatonic melodic cell on a soft bell/pluck synth (D pentatonic across 2 octaves ŌåÆ **zero harmonic tension**; the entire drama is metric). Each voice runs its own "Tale of Two Clocks" lookahead scheduler (25 ms interval, 120 ms ahead, sample-accurate off `AudioContext.currentTime`) at its own fixed period; the voices phase against each other forever. **NO resolution, NO solve button** ŌĆö the optional "stir the loom" spread slider widens/narrows the mutual-drift *velocity* but preserves irrationality at every setting (scaling an irrational deviation-from-1 by a rational keeps it irrational), so it never aligns. Visual is **inline SVG only** (NOT Canvas2D, NOT WebGL): a Nancarrow piano-roll loom ŌĆö five colored lanes whose note-onset marks scroll at the same px/sec so faster voices show denser marks and the lanes drift across each other into transient moir├® near-alignments that disperse; a dashed "NOW" playhead, per-lane ratio tags + live BPM, marks dim into the past and glow on fire. The SVG animates from mount via a silent simulated schedule so a no-audio 06:30 phone glance sees the drift alive before any gesture; audio starts on **Begin** (AudioContext built in the gesture ŌĆö iOS unlock). `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter; audio-fail ŌåÆ `text-rose-300` notice, loom keeps drifting. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + SVG ŌĆö no mic, camera, network, or secrets). No new npm deps. ~362-line `page.tsx`.

**Decide ŌĆö gates cleared:**
- **Research-first dive (path a/c):** scanned arxiv cs.SD/cs.GR + the polytempo/Nancarrow register. Freshest dated artifact: **Amanous ŌĆö "Distribution-Switching for Superhuman Piano Density on Disklavier," arXiv 2603.16890 (submitted 2026-02-28)** ŌĆö unifies Nancarrow tempo canons + Xenakis stochastics + L-systems and finds a *computational saturation threshold at 24ŌĆō30 notes/sec*. Surprising + directly Nancarrow-lineage, but **~3.5 months old ŌåÆ #5 NOT claimed** (honest; no <14-day bindable finding on metric dissonance this window ŌĆö the microtonal/polytempo world is mature, not freshly-published). The dive *positively bound* the named-reference set and confirmed metric dissonance is the right untouched primitive. RESEARCH ┬¦391 logged.
- **mode: WIDE** ŌĆö 390 was DEEP and STATE ┬¦390 explicitly queued "WIDE next per the alternation"; the JURY 2026-06-11's central complaint is monoculture ("too similar"), which WIDE with 3 orthogonal fresh concepts directly attacks. The three briefs each cleared the floor via DIFFERENT renderer├Śtechnique, ALL answering the jury's headline ("refuse to resolve, one presence, not on Canvas2D") from a different angle.
- **ambition: 2/5** ŌĆö **#1** never-used technique (**irrational-ratio polytempo / metric-dissonance lattice** ŌĆö grep-verified lab-first: `375-tempo-canon` is a *DTW score-FOLLOWER* and `302-mirror-canon` is single-pair *Reich phasing*; simultaneous fixed irrational tempi ├Ā la Nancarrow is 0├Ś; `nancarrow`/`polytempo`/`metric dissonance`/`polymeter` all grep-empty) + **#3** named reference (**Conlon Nancarrow, _Studies for Player Piano_**, Study 40 e:ŽĆ / ŌłÜ2 canons; + Amanous 2603.16890; Callender "Performing the Irrational" MTO 20.1). **#2 NOT claimed** (1 audio source + 1 SVG renderer = 2 subsystems; honest). **#4 NOT claimed** (single-cycle ŌĆö could seed a "metric dissonance / polytempo" spine). **#5 NOT claimed** (no <14-day finding ŌĆö said plainly; the jury rewards this honesty).
- **diversity: banned=[Canvas2D OUTPUT (6├Ś) ┬Ę WebGL2-shader OUTPUT (4├Ś) ┬Ę PlompŌĆōLevelt/Sethares-roughness TECH (4├Ś) ┬Ę touch/multi-touch INPUT (6├Ś) ┬Ę "tension-you-resolve-through-action" VIBE (~9├Ś) ┬Ę the "two-parties-negotiate" CONCEPT]** (JURY 2026-06-11) ┬Ę **picked (514)=[generative/none INPUT (no touch ŌĆö just Begin + an optional non-resolving slider) ┬Ę SVG OUTPUT (the jury's fresh renderer; dodges Canvas2D + WebGL2) ┬Ę irrational-polytempo / metric-dissonance TECH (lab-first, the jury's provocation-#1 "tension you COUNT, not tension you hear beating" ŌĆö explicitly NOT the banned roughness engine) ┬Ę hypnotic-eternal-NON-RESOLVING VIBE (no solve button; a state to inhabit) ┬Ę ONE-presence CONCEPT (one drifting mechanism, never two negotiating parties)]** ŌĆö hits **NONE** of the hard bans. **Curation:** **514 won** over two strong siblings. All three refuse resolution, are about one presence, and dodge every banned tag ŌĆö each via a different renderer├Śtechnique (the WIDE point). **514 is the tightest fit to the jury's LOUDEST provocation (#1)** ŌĆö it is the only candidate that puts the tension squarely in TIME (metric dissonance, the one untouched primitive left after 513 claimed comb-notch), with an exact grep-clean named reference (Nancarrow) and the **most robust demo on Karel's review phone** (pure SVG, no camera/mic/device/GPU dependency, the drift visibly alive on load with zero permissions). It's also the most legibly *new* ("huh ŌĆö you can SEE irrational tempi drift"). Both losers were complete, build-reviewed implementations banked as **STRONG seeds IDEAS ┬¦391**; folders `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative build:
- `516-slow-presence` ŌĆö **the strongest seed**: a real **WebGPU compute** Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion field (512┬▓, ping-pong `rgba16float` storage textures, 8 steps/frame) whose feed/kill rates drift along a 420 s non-repeating 7-irrational-harmonic LFO so the morphology at minute 5 is unlike minute 1 (memory; never loops); a Lydian drone mirrors the SAME LFO path (no GPU readback). SVG/DOM fallback (no Canvas2D) when `navigator.gpu` absent; audio always runs. Refs Eno *Music for Airports* + Anadol + Pearson 1993. **This is the deliberate `490-disintegration` successor the jury asked for (#2 "490 should have had children") on the jury-blessed WebGPU lane (#3)** ŌĆö and the best **#4+#5 5/5 candidate** the lab has: take it to cycle 2 binding a fresh <14-day paper. Lost only because its tension is *entropy/non-repetition*, not the jury's headline untouched **tension** primitive, and WebGPU is the riskiest demo surface (iOS).
- `515-two-tempos-one-body` ŌĆö the boldest FORMAT: a near-screenless cross-modal polytempo ŌĆö one audio pulse (period A=1.20 s) vs a **haptic** pulse (Vibration API, period B=A/ŌłÜ2) ŌĆö two irrational tempi, one heard, one *felt* in the hand, drifting forever; the screen is two faint CSS radial-gradient breathing rings + "close your eyes." `navigator.vibrate` absent (iOS/desktop) ŌåÆ amber notice + the inner emerald ring carries tempo B as a visual fallback; audio always works. Refs Nancarrow + Oliveros *Deep Listening* / La Monte Young. The genuine audio/haptic-only lane the jury dared (#3) ŌĆö lost because haptics already exist (`400-soundwalk-room`, as proximity not tempo) so its #1 is shakier, and on Karel's likely-iOS phone the full felt effect degrades to two glow rings.

**Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` with only 514 present ŌåÆ exit 0, `Ō£ō Compiled successfully in 36.0s`, `/dream/514-polytempo-loom` prerendered **static 4.4 kB / 107 kB First Load**; the winner builder also self-reported its folder tsc+eslint-clean), **NOT browser-verified** (no audio in this sandbox) ŌĆö unverified surface: whether the five irrational tempi *audibly* read as distinct drifting streams vs. mush at BASE_BPM 72 (the bell decay is 1.6 s ŌĆö denser voices may overlap); whether the cross-lane moir├® near-alignments are *perceptible* as the visual payoff (PX_PER_SEC=58, MARKS_PER_LANE=44 ŌĆö may want a denser window); the setTimeout-driven visual flash vs. the AudioContext-scheduled note may drift apart by a few ms under load; the spread slider's "stir not solve" framing reading as intended; iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock. The silent-on-load SVG drift is the safety net so the 06:30 glance always sees the loom alive.

## Cycle 390 ŌĆö 2026-06-11 (UTC) ┬Ę KIDS build (390 % 2 == 0) ┬Ę **DEEP** (3 approaches, one concept) ┬Ę SHIPS `513-kids-shadow-still` ŌĆö **Move to wake a sound; go *still* and it cancels into a hollow hush.** A continuous A2 (110 Hz) shimmer is run through a feed-forward **comb filter** (dry + a sub-millisecond DelayNode copy of itself). The child's **body-motion energy** (read by simple per-pixel **frame-difference** off an *offscreen* 64├Ś48 canvas ŌĆö NOT MediaPipe, NOT a visible canvas) drives the delay time: moving ŌćÆ delay drifts toward 10 ms (notches sparse, full flanging swoosh, shadows split apart) ┬Ę going still ŌćÆ delay slides to **1/(2┬ĘfŌéĆ) Ōēł 4.5 ms**, the *exact* anti-phase null for 110 Hz, so the comb teeth bite the fundamental and the tone **hollows toward near-silence** ŌĆö a "hushŌĆ”" label fades in. The tension is **spectral** (notches/absence), never beating-partial roughness, and it resolves toward **absence**, never a warm consonant bloom. Visible render is **inline SVG only**: a kid-silhouette + a translucent blurred **echo-shadow** that separates with motion and merges at stillness, a live **comb-teeth spectrum strip** (`|1 + g┬Ęe^(ŌłÆj2ŽĆfŽä)|` over 0ŌĆō8 kHz) whose bars drop into deep notches as it hushes, an ambient glow that dims with stillness, a motion meter. Always-on **auto-demo** (sinusoidal motion-energy, ~4.8 s) runs on load before any camera permission resolves and resumes after 3.5 s idle, so a no-camera 06:30 phone glance still hears+sees the full moveŌåÆhush arc; camera denied/absent ŌåÆ `text-rose-300` notice + demo continues. `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter + Ōēż8 kHz lowpass (kids-safe); AudioContext built inside the Start gesture (iOS unlock). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + SVG; camera is local frame-diff only ŌĆö never recorded/uploaded; no network, no secrets). No new npm deps. ~800-line `page.tsx`.

**Decide ŌĆö gates cleared:**

## Cycle 388 ŌĆö 2026-06-11 (UTC) ┬Ę KIDS build (388 % 2 == 0) ┬Ę **DEEP** (3 synchrony approaches, one concept) ┬Ę SHIPS `505-kids-pulse-bridge` ŌĆö **The music can only resolve home when two children tap *together*.** The screen splits into two giant tap-pads ŌĆö warm gold (left) + cool teal (right), one child per side. Each taps a steady beat; each side is a phase oscillator. A **Kuramoto order parameter** `R = |╬Ż exp(i┬Ę(Žå_LŌłÆŽå_R))| / N` over a sliding window of the two tap streams (gated by a tempo-similarity factor so big tempo mismatches don't read as "in sync", compressed by `R^0.65` so partial sync still feels good, then **asymmetrically smoothed** ŌĆö Žä_rise 1.8 s / Žä_fall 3.2 s so a lock must be *sustained* but one late tap doesn't collapse it) yields one scalar 0ŌåÆ1. That scalar drives BOTH: (audio) two voices that voice-lead via `setTargetAtTime` from a yearning major-2nd (A3/B3) toward a warm open-fifth (C4/G4) **only as synchrony rises** ŌĆö a soft CŌĆōEŌĆōG arrival shimmer on the lock-threshold crossing, a C2+G2 ambient pad always under it; (visual) a Canvas2D **bridge of light** (cubic bezier) between the halves that is broken/dim at low sync and completes into a continuous glowing arc with **fireflies streaming across** at lock, warm radial bloom at center. **No "wrong"** ŌĆö out of sync is "not yet," never a fail state. Always-on **26 s auto-demo** (two simulated tappers: apartŌåÆconvergingŌåÆlockedŌåÆdrifting) so a no-touch 06:30 phone glance shows it alive; cancels on first real tap. Pointer-Events `pointerId` multitouch + pointer-capture so two fingers work at once; `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter + Ōēż9 kHz lowpass (kids-safe); AudioContext created in the Start gesture (iOS unlock); Canvas2D-null ŌåÆ audio continues + `text-rose-300` notice. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client synthesis ŌĆö no mic, camera, network, or secrets). ## Cycle 385 ŌĆö 2026-06-11 (UTC) ┬Ę ADULT build (385 % 2 == 1) ┬Ę **DEEP** (3 agent-brains, one concept) ┬Ę SHIPS `496-voyager-room` ŌĆö **You don't play notes ŌĆö you CONDUCT a room of five autonomous machine musicians who listen to each other and to you, leaning the collective harmony into deliberate dissonance and releasing it back to consonance.** Five named agents ŌĆö VEGA (Leader, states the root motif), LYRA (Harmonist, roughness-*minimizing*), DRACO (Provocateur, roughness-*raising*, tritone/m2-biased and dial-weighted), ECHO (Follower, imitates the loudest peer transposed ŌĆö draws the lit answering edge), NEBULA (Drifter, whole-tone pad) ŌĆö each a probabilistic generator with its own timbre/pan/color, all snapped to **D dorian** so dissonance is always a *layered choice*, never noise. The **shared brain** (`agents.ts`) scores each candidate note by voice-leading + **predicted PlompŌĆōLevelt/Sethares sensory roughness** if it joined the currently-sounding partials (`roughness.ts`) + personality bias, softmax-sampled, steering *measured* roughness toward the conductor's **tension target**. Conducting = a **TENSION dial** (consonanceŌćädissonance, primary), **TEMPO**, and **spotlight an agent** (tap an orb to make it lead). Frame-synchronous beat clock: each due agent emits in lock-step reading the **previous frame's** event buffer + the live dial. Canvas2D constellation (orbs size/brightness = activity, lit edges = imitation, center tension-ring Resolved┬ĘSettling┬ĘTense┬ĘClashing + live roughness, orbs sprout spikes when tense). Always-on auto-conduct runs a ~20 s settleŌåÆbuildŌåÆrelease arc so the room is alive hands-free on load. `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter; iOS AudioContext-in-gesture; audio-only graceful degrade if Canvas2D null. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client synthesis ŌĆö no mic, camera, network, or secrets). No new npm deps.

**Decide.** 385 % 2 == 1 ŌåÆ adult. **Research-first dive** (mandatory, 15-min): scanned `arxiv.org/list/cs.SD/recent` (last 7 days) + WebRTC/collaborative-music + NIME 2026. Bound a genuine <14-day finding: **StreamMUSE ŌĆö "Real-Time Language Model Jamming: A Case Study for Live Music Accompaniment Generation," Bowen Zheng et al., arXiv 2606.11886 (submitted 2026-06-10)** ŌĆö its core is **frame-synchronous streaming inference** (generate each next musical event in lock-step with a shared clock + a live external signal). I implement that *loop architecture* on-device with a lightweight probabilistic generator (no server, no ML lib) ŌĆö sidestepping the trap RESEARCH ┬¦377/┬¦383 already logged (latent-diffusion co-performance is server-heavy/not client-buildable). **Concept origin (today's research ŌåÆ today's build, per the chain rule):** the WebRTC-multi-user lane the JURY flagged 0├Ś turned out *occupied* (grep found `319-hub-score`/`334`/`341` BroadcastChannel collab), and the "responsive accompanist" lane is *saturated* (`251`/`256`/`375`/`380`/`391`/`210`/`298`) ŌĆö so I rejected both as "too similar" traps and found the real gap: **not one partner that FOLLOWS you, but an ENSEMBLE of autonomous machine improvisers who listen to each other AND to you** ŌĆö George Lewis's **_Voyager_** lineage (grep-verified: zero prior `Voyager` cite; no "multi-agent / ensemble-of-agents / machine musician" in 490+ folders). That is genuinely lab-first AND demoable SOLO (no 2nd device), unlike WebRTC.

**ambition: 5/5** ŌĆö **#1** never-used technique (a *multi-agent autonomous machine-improviser ensemble you conduct*; the lab's improvisers are all single-partner follow/harmonize/echo ŌĆö grep-clean) ┬Ę **#2** Ōēź3 subsystems (5: per-agent probabilistic generators + shared previous-frame listening buffer + real-time PlompŌĆōLevelt/Sethares roughness steering + frame-sync clock + conducting UI + Canvas2D viz) ┬Ę **#3** named references (George Lewis _Voyager_; StreamMUSE 2606.11886; PlompŌĆōLevelt 1965 / Sethares 1998) ┬Ę **#4** multi-cycle (cycle 1 of the new **Machine Ensemble / Voyager spine**) ┬Ę **#5** binds a <14-day finding (StreamMUSE, 2026-06-10 ŌĆö *implemented* as the frame-sync loop, not negatively-steered). The window's 2nd 5/5 (after 384), keeping the JURY's "#5 never binds" momentum.

## Cycle 383 ŌĆö 2026-06-10 (UTC) ┬Ę ADULT build (383 % 2 == 1) ┬Ę **WIDE** (3 divergent explorers) ┬Ę SHIPS `490-disintegration` ŌĆö **A warm modal loop that physically DISINTEGRATES as you listen ŌĆö different at minute 5 than minute 1, crumbling toward silence, and the act of listening is what consumes it.** An homage to **William Basinski, *The Disintegration Loops* (2002)** (the tape that shed its iron-oxide as it played). The loop is held as a single **mutable `Float32Array` "tape"** divided into 256 regions, each carrying PERSISTENT, monotonically-dying state (`survival`, an accumulating one-pole-lowpass `cutoff` so highs erode first, `torn`). Every pass the scheduler (a) `tape.step()`s ŌĆö a small RANDOM IRREVERSIBLE round of damage: a few regions lose survival, all living regions darken, and short sample windows are **permanently zeroed in the buffer itself** (soft-edged so no clicks) ŌĆö then (b) bakes the eroded samples into a fresh one-shot `AudioBuffer` and queues it seamlessly. Because each pass re-renders the *already-eroded* buffer and reads+writes the same `samples`, nothing ever recovers ŌĆö entropy only rises. Two minimal conceptual gestures let the listener shape *how it dies, never whether*: **hold to remember** (slows the bite to 0.35├Ś, never reverses) and **tap the ring to re-excite** a faded region (returns a faint muffled ghost from the pristine seed, but taxes every *other* region ŌĆö net entropy still rises). An always-on sub-bass room-tone floor fades last so it's never an abrupt cut. Canvas2D **eroding tape-ring**: each region an arc whose thickness/brightness = surviving content, hue cooling as it muffles, tearing into dark gaps as it dies; a violet playhead sweeps; center ember + `pass N ┬Ę M% remains` readout. `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter; iOS AudioContext created/resumed inside the Start tap; graceful canvas-null fallback (audio keeps disintegrating). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client synthesis ŌĆö no mic, camera, network, or secrets). No new npm deps.

**This is the JURY's (2026-06-10) #1 provocation answered head-on:** *bring genuine tension back ŌĆö 15/15 recent pieces are consonant, 10 resolve warmly on purpose; build ONE piece with tension the listener resolves through action, not a pre-baked cadence.* Disintegration has **no resolution at all** ŌĆö only entropy the listener can shape but never escape. It lands **two starved-menu categories at once**: **conceptual/critical** (the menu literally lists *"a recording you can't hear without doing something costly"* ŌĆö here listening is the cost) AND **long-form evolving adult** (*"different at minute 5 than minute 1"* ŌĆö ~8.6 s loop ├Ś ~35 passes of compounding damage ŌåÆ skeletal and dark by minute 5, crumbling to near-silence).

**Ambition 2/5:** **#1** never-before-used technique ŌĆö **persistent, irreversible progressive audio-buffer self-disintegration** (grep-verified: `basinski`/`disintegration loop`/`self-eras`/`progressive degrad` all absent across 340 dream folders) + **#3** named reference (Basinski, *The Disintegration Loops*, 2002). (#2 not claimed ŌĆö 1 audio source + 1 canvas = 2 subsystems; #4 not claimed ŌĆö single-cycle; #5 honestly NOT claimed ŌĆö the dive found no bindable <14-day finding, see below.) Honest: this is a *conceptual* big-swing, not a subsystem-stack ŌĆö its ambition is the idea (a piece that destroys itself), not the plumbing.

## Cycle 369 ŌĆö 2026-06-09 (UTC) ┬Ę ADULT build (369 % 2 == 1) ┬Ę DEEP (3 approaches) ┬Ę SHIPS `454-piano-caption-loom` ŌĆö **SPINE cycle-2: the caption a latent image is dreamed from is no longer written in one shot ŌĆö a council of agents *critiques and refines* it across 3 visible rounds, from Karel's real recorded piano.** Cycle 1 (`448-piano-phrase-painter`) ran the closed audioŌåÆimageŌåÆaudio loop on the real piano with a SINGLE template prompt. **Diversity audit (last 10 shipped: 408/404/402/400/397/394/393/391/390/387):** OUTPUT counts ŌåÆ **Canvas2D Ōēź4├Ś (408, 404, 400, 390, 394) = OVER-REPRESENTED ŌåÆ BANNED this cycle** by the diversity-audit rule (Ōēź4 in last 10); plus the standing JURY 2026-06-07 bans (raw-WebGL2, three.js, MIDI/keyboard, touch/tap, D-Dorian). `diversity: banned=[Canvas2D(over-rep Ōēź4├Ś), raw-WebGL2, three.js, MIDI/keyboard, touch/tap, D-Dorian] ┬Ę picked(410)=[autonomous-generative INPUT ┬Ę **inline-SVG OUTPUT** ┬Ę a-life consonance-foraging TECHNIQUE ┬Ę emergent no-fixed-scale microtonal VIBE]` ŌĆö **none of the winner's tags is banned.** This is the decisive curation axis: both Canvas2D siblings (409 field / 411 spiral) were build-reviewed clean and arguably the more legible/surprising vizes, but Canvas2D was banned by over-representation, so the **SVG** winner was the diversity-compliant ship. The fire deliberately spread renderers (410 SVG / 409 Canvas2D-heatmap / 411 Canvas2D-spiral) so exploration wasn't monocultural.

**Orchestration:** 3 folder-isolated Builders ŌĆö 409 conchordal-field (Canvas2D heatmap) / 410 conchordal-garden (SVG) / 411 conchordal-spiral (Canvas2D spiral) ŌĆö spawned concurrently, each self-contained, each implementing the shared Conchordal DCC engine under a different renderer. I (Orchestrator/Planner/Curator) verified each from its ACTUAL code + self-reports ŌĆö read `410/engine.ts` in full (a genuine PlompŌĆōLevelt partial-pair roughness + harmonicity-bonus fitness, Metropolis pitch foraging with crowding penalty, consonance-metabolism with death/reproduce/re-seed, Kuramoto neighbour-coupled phase, and correct additive Web-Audio voices with `setTargetAtTime` glide + ConvolverNode reverb + DynamicsCompressor + deferred teardown ŌĆö not a stub) and `409/page.tsx` + `411/engine.ts` to compare. All three self-reported `tsc --noEmit` + ESLint clean. **One fix applied to the winner:** `410/page.tsx` `drawStem()` re-rolled `Math.random()` every frame (jittery stems) ŌåÆ made the stem control point a **stable Kuramoto-phase sway** (`sin(phase)*6*health`), so stems breathe instead of jitter.

## Cycle 347 ŌĆö 2026-06-07 (UTC) ┬Ę ADULT build ┬Ę DEEP (2 approaches) ┬Ę SHIPS `400-soundwalk-room` ŌĆö **cycle 2 of the spatial-audio thread** and the lab's **first haptic output**: where 394 let you *rotate* a fixed FOA field, this lets you *walk through* it (6DoF translation, with audible frontŌåÆsideŌåÆbehind parallax) and *feel* each voice brush past via a Sound2Hap-style Vibration-API tap

**Git sync / env:** `git fetch && checkout main && pull --ff-only` ŌĆö clean fast-forward (+45 commits; HEAD was cycle-346 `ŌĆ”` = last folder `397-kids-crystal-bloom`). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` was **MISSING** ŌåÆ `npm ci` (exit 0, from existing lockfile; package.json/lock untouched + excluded). Max committed folder on disk = 397; IDEAS-banked text labels 398/399 (┬¦346, kids-rainbow-roll / kids-aurora-step) are text-only (no folders, reserved for the next kids fire) ŌåÆ pre-allocated **400/401** to the two builders (collision-free).

**Love signal** (`/api/dream/votes`): the spatial/immersive lineage carries soft loves (`42-binaural`, `7-spatial`, `148-spatial-palette`, `133-ripple-pond`, `107-ocean-presence`); no single love forced the pick ŌĆö the queued cycle-2 deepening + JURY prov #5 + the ambition/diversity gates governed ŌĆö but a walk-through-and-feel spatial room sits squarely in that loved immersive family.

**Research-first ŌåÆ build chain (RESEARCH ┬¦347, today, web tools healthy):** 15-min dive anchoring the two missing dimensions of the spatial thread (394 only *rotated*). Two verified hits: **Google "Ambisonics soundfield navigation using directional decomposition + path-distance estimation"** (research.google ŌĆö the 6DoF *translation* recipe; trivial for us since synthesized sources give direction+distance for free) and **Sound2Hap (arXiv:2601.12245, CHI 2026, ~Jan 2026)** ŌĆö a perceptually-validated audioŌåÆvibrotactile mapping, the **freshest dated anchor** in this dive and directly on the haptic technique. **Chain visible:** dive ŌåÆ "add TRANSLATION + HAPTICS to the ambisonic room" ŌåÆ ship `400-soundwalk-room`.

**Decide ŌĆö gates cleared:**
- **Rotation:** 347 % 2 = 1 ŌåÆ **adult** (AGENT decide-step). No blocker on disk; nothing in-progress <70%. Cycle-345/346 queues both named 347 = "deepen 394 ŌåÆ cycle 2 (fold 396-soundwalk locomotion + Vibration-API haptics into the ambisonic field)."
- **JURY (2026-06-07) directed pick:** provocation **#5** (the embodiment gap ŌĆö "still only ONE truly off-screen piece in 15; the lab keeps *researching* the 2026 ambisonics wave and never building itŌĆ” spend a DEEP cycle on the non-screen / spatial-audio / haptic shelf") + **#3** ("stop satisfying the floor with the two cheapest criteria ŌĆö stack the two *expensive* ones, #4 multi-cycle AND #5 genuinely-recent ŌĆö and deepen the standout thread instead of opening a fresh explorer"). This fire does exactly both: a cycle-2 deepening of the 394 spatial thread that leads with #4+#5.
- **Mode: DEEP** ŌĆö one ambitious concept (*walk through + feel the ambisonic room*), **2 different technical attacks** (audio-first 6DoF translation vs. haptic-LED eyes-closed wayfinding). DEEP alternates correctly off cycle 346's WIDE; JURY explicitly asked for a DEEP cycle on this shelf.

Winner uses **none** of the banned tags and opens two firsts (6DoF translation; haptic output). The banked sibling 401 was clean on every axis too.

Read `400/page.tsx` + `400/soundwalk.ts` + `400/haptics.ts` headers end-to-end (correct AudioContext-in-gesture, per-source HRTF PannerNode path-distance re-render with parallax, inverse-distance clamp + brick-wall limiter, Sound2Hap pass-event haptics with per-voice latch + global cooldown, full cleanup on stop AND unmount incl. `vibrate(0)`, no `use*`-named helpers, no api route, three `text-rose-300` degradation notices, typography-compliant) + both READMEs.
- **`400-soundwalk-room` (WINNER ŌåÆ shipped)** ŌĆö 6DoF translation (walk through the field; voices swing frontŌåÆsideŌåÆbehind = parallax) + Sound2Hap-style Vibration-API haptics; 7 JI overtone voices of A1Ōēł55 Hz. **Won on three axes:** (a) it's the genuine **technical leap** past 394 ŌĆö 394 only *rotated* a fixed-distance field; 400 *translates* (the real 6DoF distinction), the first piece to do so; (b) its **primary channel is audio**, so it demos on every device (haptics is a bonus layer, not a dependency) ŌĆö the robust 06:30-phone-glance pick, where 401's whole haptic thesis is invisible on a non-vibrating device; (c) richer **legible running view** (per-voice legend + Hz + haptic-radius "brush" rings + per-voice loudness glow). See INDEX/README.

Build-reviewed clean; same 5-criteria ambition spine. **Didn't win ŌĆö strong runner-up:** the more *surprising experience* and the most literally off-screen piece the lab has, BUT its entire thesis (FEEL where to walk) is **invisible on a non-vibrating device** (most desktops / iOS Safari = the 06:30 review risk 400 dodges), and on a phone the auto-walk+audio reads close to 400's. **Revive:** the designated next dedicated off-screen / haptic-led fire (directly answers jury prov #5's embodiment gap), OR fold its quickening homing-pulse into 400 as an optional "guide me to a voice" mode.

The hands-free auto-demo is the safety net so a denied/slow mic never blocks the demo at 06:30.
- **Jury alignment**: answers the kids critique directly ŌĆö gives the lane the **memory/consequence** `350` lacked (growing shared rhythm), holds the **D-Dorian / anti-pentatonic** line, and moves the *experience* (the phone genuinely listens to your hands) rather than relabeling a poke-toy. The WIDE-3 orchestration is the portfolio choreography (planner sets 3 diverse briefs ŌåÆ 3 parallel makers ŌåÆ critic reads the actual code + runs the authoritative build ŌåÆ curator ships one validated winner + banks two build-verified ready-to-ship seeds).

## Cycle 335 ŌĆö 2026-06-06 (UTC) ŌĆö adult build ┬Ę DEEP (3 legibility approaches to ONE concept) ┬Ę SHIPS `370-tonal-map` ŌĆö the **deepening of the Spiral-Array thread** the JURY keeps demanding, finally shipped, and shipped *fixed for legibility*. Implements **Elaine Chew's Spiral Array** (MIT, 2000) tonal model ŌĆö the music's **center of effect** (weighted centroid of sounding pitch-class points) ŌĆö but renders it as a **top-down, labeled circle-of-fifths MAP** so the abstract 3-D helix that sank `364-tonal-orbit` becomes a readable map you navigate: a bright **comet of tonal gravity** glides across named key territories, a **modulation is literally the comet crossing from the "C" disc to the "G" disc**, and a fading **trail** shows where it's been. The surprising legibility move (straight from today's research): the **tonal-focus** scalar ŌĆö how concentrated recent pitch content is around the center of gravity (arXiv:2603.27035, gravitational centering) ŌĆö drives the comet's **halo radius**, so you *see* focus tighten in-key and **bloom wide the instant a modulation begins**, not just read a number. Internal demo auto-plays a deliberately dramatic modulating journey (CŌåÆGŌåÆDŌåÆEmŌåÆC) so the comet visibly tours the map at the 06:30 phone review; **Web MIDI** feeds a pianist's own playing into the identical pipeline. ## Cycle 334 ŌĆö 2026-06-06 (UTC) ŌĆö kids build ┬Ę DEEP (3 play-models of ONE concept) ┬Ę SHIPS `368-kids-rainbow-quest` ŌĆö the lab's **first color-foraging *game***: a friendly unicorn shows a glowing color and *wants* it, so a 4-year-old goes and **points the phone camera at something that color in the real world** (red, then orange, then yellowŌĆ”). Getting close makes the creature **glow warmer** with a rising musical shimmer; holding the match ~0.6s triggers a **fanfare + sparkle burst** and fills a **rainbow arc** across the top; collect all seven ŌåÆ the arc plays a **rainbow song** and loops with a fresh shuffle. No reading, no timer, no score, no fail ŌĆö and crucially it gets the child *off the couch into their room* (the most direct answer yet to the JURY's "stop staring at the screen"). ColorŌåÆpitch is the most legible kids mapping (KIDS.md: "color is the language"); each hue ŌåÆ a note in **D-Dorian** (NOT C-pentatonic) over an always-on D+A drone; **camera is analysis-only** (no recording, no upload, no network). ## Cycle 333 ŌĆö 2026-06-06 (UTC) ŌĆö adult build ┬Ę DEEP (3 technical approaches to ONE concept) ┬Ę SHIPS `365-cadence-ladder` ŌĆö a real-time **tonal/functional harmonic analyst**: it names the KEY you're in, the Roman-numeral FUNCTION of every chord, and makes the *pull-and-resolve of harmony visible* as a three.js tension ladder (Tonic at rest on the bottom ┬Ę Subdominant departing in the middle ┬Ę Dominant pulling at the top). Each chord drops into its functional zone as a glowing block; **cadences flash named resolving arcs** ŌĆö VŌåÆI *authentic* (emerald), IVŌåÆI *plagal/"amen"* (violet), VŌåÆvi *deceptive* (amber); when the music **modulates** a ripple sweeps the scene and every Roman numeral re-contextualises (the same chord changes function as the key shifts). The lab's **first key-estimation + functional/cadence analysis** (grep-verified ŌĆö `229-chord-canvas` names chords but does NO key, NO Roman numerals, NO cadence/function). Proves itself 358-style: an internally-authored progression (C major with authentic/deceptive/plagal cadences ŌåÆ modulates to G major) is **known ground truth**, so the analyzer is watched proving itself on a phone with no hardware; **Web MIDI** lets a pianist play their own chords into the identical pipeline. Auto-plays on Begin; alive in ~10 s at the 06:30 review.

**Decide gates (all cleared):**
- **Rotation:** 333 % 2 = 1 ŌåÆ **adult** (kids resumes 334). No blocker on disk; nothing in-progress <70% (360 shipped demoable last fire).
- **JURY-directed pick:** JURY 2026-06-06's loudest adult provocation is *"feed the legible/instructional lane ŌĆö build the obvious next one: a real-time score-follower or a **chord/key analyzer that names the harmony you play**"* (its named wins were the legible 358/353/345) AND *"starve the adult JI-drone monoculture."* I took the analyzer, deepened past mere chord-naming (already in lab at 229) into **key-finding + functional/cadence analysis** ŌĆö the instructional lane the jury asked to feed. (Deliberately did NOT take the jury's other option, deepening Mirror-Canon cycle-2; banked the Spiral-Array runner-up as the multi-cycle thread to deepen instead ŌĆö noted below.)
- **Research-first ŌåÆ build chain:** RESEARCH ┬¦333 (today) ŌĆö Krumhansl-Schmuckler key-finding is commodity in standalone tools (wutools, Meyda-based browser detectors, arXiv 2505.17259 "Audio Key Detection," May 2025) but **grep-clean in this lab**; the empty shelf is *functional* analysis (key + Roman numeral + cadence), not chord-naming. Build implements that hook directly. Chain visible.
- **Ambition floor (4/5):** `ambition: #1 never-used-technique (Krumhansl-Schmuckler key estimation + Roman-numeral functional labeling + cadence detection + modulation tracking ŌĆö grep-verified lab-first; 229 does chord-NAME only) + #2 Ōēź3 subsystems (decaying pitch-class profile + K-S key estimator w/ hysteresis + chord-quality template matcher + Riemann functional/cadence mapper + three.js ladder render + Web-Audio synth = 6) + #3 named reference (Krumhansl & Kessler 1982 probe-tone profiles ┬Ę Temperley 2001 ┬Ę Riemann 1893 functional harmony ┬Ę Aldwell & Schachter cadence tradition) + #5 recent-research (RESEARCH ┬¦333 today)`.
- **Diversity audit (vs last 10 shipped = 360,358,355,353,350,347,346,345,341,337):** OUTPUT ŌĆö raw-WebGL2 4├Ś (360,347,345,341 ŌåÆ WARM/avoid), DOM/CSS 3├Ś (355,353,346), three.js 2├Ś (358,337 ŌĆö safe), SVG 1├Ś (350, jury-banned separately). INPUT ŌĆö touch & mic/voice jury-BANNED; tilt/seed/clock/keyboard/external spread thin. `diversity: banned (JURY 2026-06-06)=[touch INPUT ┬Ę mic/voice INPUT ┬Ę inline-SVG OUTPUT ┬Ę adult-JI-drone VIBE] + (self) raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT (warm 4├Ś)] ┬Ę picked=[MIDI/internal-demo INPUT (NOT touch, NOT mic) ┬Ę three.js OUTPUT (2├Ś ŌĆö cools the warm raw-WebGL2; NOT SVG) ┬Ę K-S-key-finding/functional-analysis TECHNIQUE (lab-first) ┬Ę instructional/legible VIBE (NOT a JI-drone)]`. Dodges every HARD ban; cools the warm raw-WebGL2 renderer.
- **Mode:** `mode: DEEP` ŌĆö ONE big concept ("name the key + function you play, live"), three competing technical/visual approaches. Alternates off cycle 332's WIDE. Chosen per the orchestration rule (read JURY first): the jury wanted the instructional lane *deepened*, and DEEP-on-one-concept is the tool for "ship the depth, not a fourth fresh explorer."
- **Loves bias:** soft pulls from the systems/harmony/instructional love-cluster ŌĆö `223-fourier-paint`ŌØż’ĖÅ (analysis-made-visible), `236-particle-life-song`ŌØż’ĖÅ / `130-tsl-particle-compute`ŌØż’ĖÅ (systems legibility), `157-concept-steer`ŌØż’ĖÅ (steerable musical structure). No single love forced the pick; the JURY's instructional-lane directive governed.

**Orchestration (DEEP, 3 folder-isolated builders, parallel; pre-allocated 363/364/365):**
- **`365-cadence-ladder` (WINNER ŌåÆ shipped)** ŌĆö K-S key-finding + functional Tonic/Subdominant/Dominant ladder + named cadence arcs + modulation ripple, three.js. **Won** on: **most instructional** (teaches WHY harmony moves ŌĆö tensionŌåÆresolution made literal ŌĆö directly feeding the jury's named win-lane, where 363 "only" names key+function and 364 is abstract); **richest legible payoff** (named authentic/plagal/deceptive arcs + live Roman-numeral re-labeling on modulation); **most distinct from the existing 229-chord-canvas**; strongest/most-referenced README. page.tsx (444) + scene.ts (429) + key-finder.ts (288) + audio.ts (221) + README (171). Authoritative `npm run build` Ō£ō exit 0 (`Ō£ō Compiled successfully in 2.0min`; `/dream/365-cadence-ladder` 7.6 kB route / 295 kB First Load ŌĆö three.js bundle, expected).
- **`364-tonal-orbit` (banked ŌåÆ IDEAS ┬¦333, moved to /tmp)** ŌĆö **Elaine Chew's Spiral Array** (MIT 2000) in 3D: chord/key "center of effect" spheres travel through a helix of fifths; modulation = the center-of-gravity migrating across tonal space. The **most ambitious/surprising technique** of the slate (a genuine lab-first spatial-tonality model) but **lost on legibility** ŌĆö an abstract sphere drifting in a helix is exactly the abstraction the jury is steering the lab AWAY from. **Flagged as the multi-cycle thread to deepen** next adult cycle (it's the jury's "actually deepen something" answer in a fresh, non-Mirror-Canon form).
- **`363-key-compass` (banked ŌåÆ IDEAS ┬¦333, moved to /tmp)** ŌĆö circle-of-fifths key wheel that **rotates to re-center on modulation** (the cleanest single "the ground moved" gesture); demo modulates CŌåÆGŌåÆEb (a bVI surprise to test the hysteresis). The **most iconic/immediately-readable** of the three but "only" names key+function (no cadence/tension teaching). Strong as a simpler companion or to fold its rotating-wheel gesture into 365.

**Verification posture:** verified from the actual winner code (page/scene/key-finder/audio skim + README read end-to-end) + a safety grep across all three (zero SVG `createElementNS`, zero `getContext('2d')` as a main renderer ŌĆö the two `2d` hits are CanvasTexture text-labels for three.js sprites, standard; zero api routes, zero `getUserMedia`, zero `use*`-named hook-trap helpers; `webkitAudioContext` casts are properly eslint-disabled) + the authoritative `npm run build` with ONLY 365 present. All three builders again mis-reported `key-finder.ts` as "pre-existing" (the recurring memory artifact ŌĆö the code is genuinely theirs). **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** ŌĆö unverified surface: whether K-S key-finding + the hysteresis (0.08 margin / ~0.5 s) reads cleanly on the short demo chords; whether the three.js drop-animation, cadence-arc visibility, and DOM-label positioning over the canvas look as designed on a phone; iOS AudioContext unlock; real Web MIDI on hardware (no GPU/MIDI in this sandbox).

## Cycle 332 ŌĆö 2026-06-06 14:26 UTC ŌĆö kids build ┬Ę WIDE (3 UNRELATED lab-first simulation toys) ┬Ę SHIPS `360-kids-sand-choir` ŌĆö the lab's **first falling-sand granular cellular automaton** (grep-verified 0 across 350+ prototypes). A 4-year-old pours streams of glowing warm sand from a top spout; **tilting the iPad** turns the world's gravity so the dunes flow and reshape left/right/down; seven harp strings tuned to **D-Dorian** cross the lower field, and every grain that comes to *rest on a string* plucks a soft KarplusŌĆōStrong note ŌĆö so **the shape of the dune you build IS the song** (the most legible cross-modal mapping the kids lane can make, the direct answer to the JURY's standing #1 "make it legible"). Auto-sways and plucks itself hands-free for the 06:30 phone review (no sensor needed); pointer-drag fallback on desktop; always-on D+A pad + brick-wall limiter so it's never silent and never harsh.

- **Diversity audit (vs last 10 = 358,355,353,350,347,346,345,341,337,334):** `diversity: banned (JURY 2026-06-06)=[touch INPUT ┬Ę mic/voice INPUT ┬Ę inline-SVG OUTPUT ┬Ę adult-JI-drone VIBE] ┬Ę picked=[tilt INPUT ┬Ę WebGL2 OUTPUT ┬Ę falling-sand-CA TECHNIQUE ┬Ę kids-warm-elemental VIBE]`. Alternates off cycle 330's DEEP. Chosen because the JURY had no "deepen X" kids directive and WIDE is the named tool against "too similar" ŌĆö three genuinely different CAs in one fire.

## Cycle 330 ŌĆö 2026-06-06 10:30 UTC ŌĆö kids build ┬Ę DEEP (3 play-models for ONE concept) ┬Ę SHIPS `355-kids-glass-armonica` ŌĆö a **Benjamin Franklin glass armonica** for kids: a row of 8 glasses you TUNE by dragging water up/down (more water = lower pitch ŌĆö the water level you SEE *is* the pitch you hear, the most literal cross-modal mapping the lab can make), then PLAY by **swiping a finger across the rims** so each glass the finger crosses *sings* a sustained, breathy, overlapping wash (the famous "otherworldly" armonica sustain ŌĆö NOT a struck bell). A ghost-finger auto-demo sweeps back and forth for ~12 s so the instrument plays itself at the 06:30 open. The lab's **first fill-to-tune instrument** and **first rubbed-glass continuous-armonica voice** ŌĆö water as a legible pitch dial, the inverse of an abstract glow.

NO force-push divergence. On-disk AGENT.md = current 386-line version (AMBITION & DIVERSITY + MULTI-AGENT ORCHESTRATION present). `node_modules` shipped absent ŌåÆ `npm ci` before the authoritative build. Worked directly on main; scoped `git add` to `docs/dreams/` + `src/app/dream/355-kids-glass-armonica/`. Highest on-disk folder = 353 ŌåÆ pre-allocated **354/355/356** to the three DEEP Builders (collision-free). WebSearch surfaced that browser hand/body tracking is now commodity (Google MediaPipe + Bolt's May-2026 face/hand-tracking starter templates) ŌĆö but a grep confirmed the lab ALREADY uses MediaPipe/camera/hand/shadow heavily (`234-kids-hand-creature`, `258-kids-mirror-pets`, `287-mirror-choir`, `302-mirror-canon-round`, `268`/`295` shadow), so that's not a novel axis here. Honest freshness (JURY #5 no-fake-novelty): glass-armonica acoustics + Web Audio synthesis are foundational, NOT <30-day ŌĆö the recent signal is direction-of-field (camera tracking is commodity, deliberately NOT chased ŌĆö already 5├Ś+ in lab) + the saturation audit; the build's novelty is **lab-first-for-the-mechanic** (fill-to-tune + rubbed-glass voice), claimed as such. Chain today's-research ŌåÆ today's-build is direct (path-a): ┬¦330 saturation audit ŌåÆ glass-harp as the buildable fresh anchor whose tuning is VISIBLE (water level = pitch), the most literal kids answer to JURY #1 (make it legible).

**Decide ŌĆö gates cleared**:
- **Action = Build new (Decide priority #4), DIVERSITY-directed**: 330 % 2 = 0 ŌåÆ kids. No blocker on disk; nothing in-progress <70% (353 shipped demoable last fire). STATE ┬¦328/┬¦329 queued cycle 330 (kids) as SHIP `348-kids-domino-song` OR `349-kids-marble-bells`. **I deliberately did NOT take either**: both are **chain-reaction** pieces and `350-kids-bump-along` (chain-reaction) shipped *last* kids cycle (328) ŌĆö a second chain-reaction kids piece the very next kids fire is the "too similar in design and theme" the AMBITION & DIVERSITY mandate exists to stop, AND with `350` shipped, the domino/marble seeds can no longer claim ambition #1 (chain-reaction is now IN the lab). ONE concept = *"a tuned water-glass instrument ŌĆö fill glasses with water to tune them (water level = visible pitch), then play them."* Three distinct PLAY MODELS, all touch INPUT / DOM/CSS OUTPUT / glass-fill-tuning TECHNIQUE / kids-playful VIBE (each Ōēź2 ambition): (354) **water-glasses** ŌĆö drag-to-fill, *tap-to-strike* struck glass-bells; (355) **glass-armonica** ŌĆö drag-to-fill, *swipe-across-rims* continuous rubbed-glass sustain; (356) **pour-organ** ŌĆö *pour water between vessels* (conservation puzzle: filling one empties another), tap to play. (b) **best 06:30 first-open** ŌĆö a self-playing ghost-finger *wash* is the most beautiful thing to open to on a phone, and the swept overlapping voices read the concept instantly; (c) **lowest 4yo skill-floor of the three** ŌĆö *swipe a finger across* needs no precision and can't be done "wrong," vs `356`'s two-vessel *pour* drag (a harder fine-motor + more abstract cause-effect) and `354`'s tap-then-it's-just-a-glockenspiel; (d) **most faithful to the named reference** (the armonica IS the rubbed-rim sustain, not a struck bell); (e) **code robustness** ŌĆö refs-driven rAF w/ dt-clamp, full teardown, correct pointer-capture + bounding-rect hit-test, clean tune-vs-swipe discrimination. **One curator fix applied to the winner** (within scope, build re-verified): the rig was only built on first `pointerdown`, making the auto-demo *visual-only* until a tap ŌĆö added a mount-time `initAudio()` so the demo SOUNDS wherever autoplay is permitted (still suspended/silent on iOS until first touch ŌĆö no regression). **`356-kids-pour-organ`** (the RICHEST concept ŌĆö conservation-of-water tuning, "pour here ŌåÆ that one goes low," 11 subsystems, auto-pour in the demo) **lost on 4yo skill-floor + struck-bell-not-novel-sound** and is **re-flagged as the strong next-kids build** (resurrect with a simpler one-finger pour, or pitch it slightly older). **`354-kids-water-glasses`** (the cleanest/simplest, pure struck glass-harp) **lost on lowest-surprise** (tap-struck bells the lab already has) and is **banked** (fold its clean tap-to-strike into a future struck piece, or ship if the lane wants a pure glass-harp). ## Cycle 329 ŌĆö 2026-06-06 (UTC) ŌĆö adult build ┬Ę WIDE (3 UNRELATED explorers) ┬Ę SHIPS `353-collapse-score` ŌĆö an adult generative piece that COMPOSES ITSELF in front of you by **Wave Function Collapse**, the lab's FIRST WFC piece (grep-verified 0 across 350+ prototypes). An 8├Ś16 lattice (8 voice layers ├Ś 16 beat columns) begins in superposition; the solver collapses the lowest-Shannon-entropy cell to a weighted-random D-Dorian note, then BFS-propagates harmonic adjacency constraints to its neighbours ŌĆö and you WATCH it: dim candidate-count cells snap to bright note-labelled cells, constrained neighbours flash as the ripple spreads, while a playhead sweeps leftŌåÆright and SOUNDS each collapsed note (FM pad + bell). Composition as a *visible logical process* ŌĆö the exact inverse of the "abstract glowing cloud" the jury asked us to kill (the most literal answer to jury #1: make it LEGIBLE). Seeded mulberry32 ŌåÆ deterministic Replay; auto-reseeds on fill (long-form, never the same twice). Auto-plays on load (one **Begin** tap only if autoplay blocked), alive at the 06:30 review with full payoff in ~10 seconds.

## Cycle 328 ŌĆö 2026-06-06 (UTC) ŌĆö kids build ┬Ę DEEP (3 physics/interaction approaches to ONE concept) ┬Ę SHIPS `350-kids-bump-along` ŌĆö the lab's FIRST chain-reaction music machine for kids (110+ kids prototypes, ZERO chain-reaction pieces before ŌĆö grep-verified): a row of 7 sleepy, breathing creatures (each a bold color + a C-major-pentatonic note, BANDIMAL left=lowŌåÆright=high); tap one and a visible "bump" travels down the line ŌĆö each creature wakes, squash-stretches, and SINGS as the wave reaches it ŌĆö then it reflects off the far end and rolls back for a return melody. Tap the middle ŌåÆ two waves outward; tap both ends ŌåÆ they meet in the middle (a chord). DRAG a creature sideways to reorder the row ŌåÆ the wave plays the new order (composition by rearrangement). One little push ŌåÆ a whole melodic wave you can WATCH travel, bounce, and return. Auto-plays itself hands-free (a demo bump fires from the left every ~5.5s while idle; creatures breathe perpetually), so it's alive at the 06:30 review with zero interaction.

## Cycle 324 ŌĆö 2026-06-05 (UTC) ŌĆö kids build ┬Ę DEEP (3 interaction-model approaches to ONE concept) ┬Ę SHIPS `341-kids-star-pair` ŌĆö the lab's FIRST real-time SIMULTANEOUS two-child co-play piece: two children, each on their own screen, each hold ONE glowing star and slide it (or hum) up/down until the two stars sing in tune and LINK with a beam of light. The two voices sound continuously over a D drone; out of tune you HEAR real acoustic beating + SEE the stars jitter; land within ┬▒35┬ó of a just-intonation ratio and the beating vanishes, a bright beam snaps between the stars, they pulse together, a chime rings, ~60 sparkles burst ŌĆö one discrete, *silently-legible* "we connected!" event. Drag is the 4yo-primary control (hum yields to it); solo on one phone ŌåÆ a robot ­¤ż¢ drives the far star, pausing near consonances, so the whole find-the-lock loop reaches the reward with no second device AND no mic.

**and a genuinely complete Canvas2D/CPU twin** at ~4k agents with the identical model + connectivity read-out; 326 and 328 also returned complete, clean folders with full teardown). **Why 327 won**: (a) **ambition ŌĆö 3/5 vs 2/5**: it clears #2(four subsystems)+#3(named refs Adamatzky/Jenson/Jones/Simulacra Naturae)+#5(this fire's ┬¦319 research), where 326 and 328 sit at 2/5; shipping 326/328 would break that chain (both came from ┬¦317's bank); (c) **"massively bigger" + surprise**: a ~1M-agent GPU slime network composing a JI chord from his own piano is the highest "huh, didn't know we could do that"; ## Cycle 317 ŌĆö 2026-06-05 (UTC) ŌĆö adult build ┬Ę WIDE (3 explorers) ┬Ę SHIPS `323-latent-condensation` ŌĆö Karel's own *Welcome Home* piano pulls 120k GPU particles out of turbulent chaos: a raw-WebGPU `@compute` shader integrates them every frame (curl-noise flow blended against attraction to a morphing target), and a 6-band-FFT phrase state machine condenses the cloud into a form on each musical phrase and dissolves it back in the rests ŌĆö the "use his actual music" directive in a GPU-particle-dramaturgy form

**Git sync / env**: clean fire ŌĆö `git fetch && checkout main && pull --ff-only` fast-forwarded `2e98f5e..6c31487` (HEAD = cycle 316 `322-kids-voice-garden`; tags pulled). NO force-push divergence. Highest committed folder = 322 ŌåÆ pre-allocated **323/324/325** to the three WIDE builders (collision-free; `/tmp/dream-losers/` empty at start ŌĆö prior containers' loser folders do not persist, so the banked seeds were rebuilt from IDEAS specs). Winner shipped as `323-latent-condensation`; losers `324-stillness` + `325-seismic-choir` moved to `/tmp/dream-losers/` and banked to IDEAS.

The standing 'use his actual music' directive has *never* reached the spatial layer."* This is exactly that build.
